function initLeafletMapIfNeeded() {
    if (_leafletMap) return;
    const container = document.getElementById('leaflet-map-container');
    if (!container || typeof L === 'undefined') return;

    _leafletMap = L.map(container, {
        crs: L.CRS.Simple,
        minZoom: -3,
        maxZoom: 4,
        zoomControl: true,
        attributionControl: false
    });
    _leafletMap.setView([25, -150], -1);

    _mapLayers = {
        fog: L.layerGroup().addTo(_leafletMap),
        pins: L.layerGroup().addTo(_leafletMap),
        poi: L.layerGroup().addTo(_leafletMap),
        members: L.layerGroup().addTo(_leafletMap),
        party: L.layerGroup().addTo(_leafletMap),
        travel: L.layerGroup().addTo(_leafletMap)
    };

    _leafletMap.on('click', onMapClick);
}

function syncMapImageOverlay(stat) {
    if (!_leafletMap) return;
    const settings = getV(stat, 'World.MapSettings', DEFAULT_MAP_SETTINGS);

    let imgUrl = '';
    try { imgUrl = localStorage.getItem('mzsb_img_World.MapImage') || ''; } catch (e) {}
    if (!imgUrl) {
        let mvuVal = getV(stat, 'World.MapImage', '');
        if (Array.isArray(mvuVal)) mvuVal = mvuVal[0];
        imgUrl = mvuVal || '';
    }
    if (!imgUrl || imgUrl === 'N/A') return;

    const boundsKey = settings.MinX + ',' + settings.MaxX + ',' + settings.MinY + ',' + settings.MaxY;
    if (imgUrl === _lastMapImageUrl && boundsKey === _lastMapBoundsKey) return;

    const bounds = [[settings.MinY, settings.MinX], [settings.MaxY, settings.MaxX]];
    if (_mapImageOverlay) {
        _leafletMap.removeLayer(_mapImageOverlay);
    }
    _mapImageOverlay = L.imageOverlay(imgUrl, bounds).addTo(_leafletMap);
    if (!_lastMapImageUrl) {
        // First load only — don't fight the user's manual pan/zoom on later updates.
        _leafletMap.fitBounds(bounds);
    }
    _lastMapImageUrl = imgUrl;
    _lastMapBoundsKey = boundsKey;
}

function onMapClick(e) {
    const x = Math.round(e.latlng.lng * 10) / 10;
    const y = Math.round(e.latlng.lat * 10) / 10;

    if (_mapMode === 'add-pin') {
        setMapMode(null);
        const key = generateMapItemKey('pin');
        getOrCreateCollection('World.MapPins');
        const defaults = { Name: 'New Pin', Note: '', X: x, Y: y, Icon: 'pin' };
        showModal('New Pin', defaults, true, 'World.MapPins', key, true);
    } else if (_mapMode === 'plan-route') {
        setMapMode(null);
        openTravelPlanner(x, y, '');
    }
}

function setMapMode(mode) {
    _mapMode = mode;
    const addBtn = document.getElementById('map-btn-addpin');
    const routeBtn = document.getElementById('map-btn-planroute');
    if (addBtn) addBtn.classList.toggle('active', mode === 'add-pin');
    if (routeBtn) routeBtn.classList.toggle('active', mode === 'plan-route');
    if (_leafletMap) {
        _leafletMap.getContainer().style.cursor = mode ? 'crosshair' : '';
    }
}

function toggleAddPinMode() {
    setMapMode(_mapMode === 'add-pin' ? null : 'add-pin');
}

function togglePlanRouteMode() {
    setMapMode(_mapMode === 'plan-route' ? null : 'plan-route');
}

// Main render entry point — called once per updateStatusPanel() pass.
function updateMapPanel(stat) {
    const seeded = ensureMapDefaults(stat);
    initLeafletMapIfNeeded();
    if (!_leafletMap) return;
    syncMapImageOverlay(stat);
    renderFogLayer(stat);
    renderPinsLayer(stat);
    renderPoiLayer(stat);
    renderMemberLayer(stat);
    renderPartyLayer(stat);
    renderTravelLayer(stat);
    renderTravelPanel(stat);
    if (seeded) saveStatData(stat);
}

// --- Interactive Map: Fog of War ---

// Returns the list of currently-unrevealed FogRegions, each as {key, Name, X, Y, W, H, MinLevel, Revealed}.
function getActiveFogRegions(stat) {
    const level = Number(getV(stat, 'Mainchar.Level', 0)) || 0;
    const regions = getV(stat, 'World.FogRegions', {});
    return Object.entries(regions)
        .filter(([k]) => k !== '$meta' && k !== '$key' && k !== 'template')
        .map(([k, r]) => ({ key: k, ...r }))
        .filter(r => r && typeof r.X === 'number' && typeof r.Y === 'number' && typeof r.W === 'number' && typeof r.H === 'number')
        .filter(r => {
            const revealed = r.Revealed === true || (typeof r.MinLevel === 'number' && level >= r.MinLevel);
            return !revealed;
        });
}

function isPointFogged(x, y, activeFogRegions) {
    return activeFogRegions.some(r => x >= r.X && x <= r.X + r.W && y >= r.Y && y <= r.Y + r.H);
}

function renderFogLayer(stat) {
    if (!_mapLayers) return;
    _mapLayers.fog.clearLayers();
    const active = getActiveFogRegions(stat);
    active.forEach(r => {
        const bounds = [[r.Y, r.X], [r.Y + r.H, r.X + r.W]];
        const rect = L.rectangle(bounds, { className: 'map-fog-rect', stroke: false, fillOpacity: 0.92, interactive: false });
        _mapLayers.fog.addLayer(rect);
    });
}

// --- Interactive Map: Pins ---

function makePinIcon(emoji) {
    return L.divIcon({
        className: 'map-pin-icon',
        html: '<div class="map-pin-bubble">' + emoji + '</div>',
        iconSize: [26, 26],
        iconAnchor: [13, 26],
        popupAnchor: [0, -26]
    });
}

const MAP_PIN_SOURCES = [
    { path: 'World_Calc.Locations', icon: '🏰' },
    { path: 'World_Calc.Factions',  icon: '⚔️' },
    { path: 'World_Calc.Ruins',     icon: '🏛️' },
    { path: 'World_Calc.Events',    icon: '⚡' }
];

const POI_TYPE_ICONS = {
    capital: '🏰',
    settlement: '🏘️',
    faction: '⚔️',
    ruins: '💀',
    special: '✨'
};

function makePoiIcon(emoji) {
    return L.divIcon({
        className: 'map-poi-icon',
        html: '<div class="map-poi-bubble">' + emoji + '</div>',
        iconSize: [26, 26],
        iconAnchor: [13, 26],
        popupAnchor: [0, -26]
    });
}

function renderPoiLayer(stat) {
    if (!_mapLayers) return;
    _mapLayers.poi.clearLayers();
    const fogRegions = getActiveFogRegions(stat);
    const pois = getV(stat, 'World.PointsOfInterest', {});
    const mapSettings = getV(stat, 'World.MapSettings', DEFAULT_MAP_SETTINGS);
    Object.entries(pois).forEach(([key, item]) => {
        if (key === '$meta' || key === '$key' || key === 'template') return;
        if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') return;
        const x = Number(item.X), y = Number(item.Y);
        if (!Number.isFinite(x) || !Number.isFinite(y)) return;
        if (isPointFogged(x, y, fogRegions)) return;
        let title = item.Name !== undefined ? item.Name : key;
        if (isTuple(title)) title = tupleVal(title);
        title = String(title);
        const icon = POI_TYPE_ICONS[item.Type] || '✨';
        // Clamp render position to the map's drawn bounds — some lorebook
        // coordinates (e.g. Frostbound Ice Forest, Y:170) fall outside
        // MapSettings on purpose (see design doc); we keep the real X/Y in
        // the data but pin the marker to the edge instead of floating it
        // off the visible artwork.
        const clampedX = Math.min(Math.max(x, mapSettings.MinX), mapSettings.MaxX);
        const clampedY = Math.min(Math.max(y, mapSettings.MinY), mapSettings.MaxY);
        const marker = L.marker([clampedY, clampedX], { icon: makePoiIcon(icon) });
        const tooltipNode = document.createElement('span');
        tooltipNode.textContent = title;
        marker.bindTooltip(tooltipNode, { direction: 'top' });
        marker.on('click', () => showModal(title, item, false, null, null));
        _mapLayers.poi.addLayer(marker);
    });
}

function renderPinsLayer(stat) {
    if (!_mapLayers) return;
    _mapLayers.pins.clearLayers();
    const fogRegions = getActiveFogRegions(stat);

    const addMarker = (x, y, title, icon, onSelect) => {
        const marker = L.marker([y, x], { icon: makePinIcon(icon) });
        const tooltipNode = document.createElement('span');
        tooltipNode.textContent = title;
        marker.bindTooltip(tooltipNode, { direction: 'top' });
        marker.on('click', () => {
            if (_mapMode === 'plan-route') {
                setMapMode(null);
                openTravelPlanner(x, y, title);
            } else {
                onSelect();
            }
        });
        _mapLayers.pins.addLayer(marker);
    };

    MAP_PIN_SOURCES.forEach(src => {
        const data = getV(stat, src.path, {});
        Object.entries(data).forEach(([key, item]) => {
            if (key === '$meta' || key === '$key' || key === 'template') return;
            if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') return;
            const x = Number(item.X), y = Number(item.Y);
            if (!Number.isFinite(x) || !Number.isFinite(y)) return;
            if (isPointFogged(x, y, fogRegions)) return;
            let title = item.Name !== undefined ? item.Name : key;
            if (isTuple(title)) title = tupleVal(title);
            title = String(title);
            addMarker(x, y, title, src.icon, () => showModal(title, item, true, src.path, key));
        });
    });

    const pins = getV(stat, 'World.MapPins', {});
    Object.entries(pins).forEach(([key, item]) => {
        if (key === '$meta' || key === '$key' || key === 'template') return;
        if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') return;
        const x = Number(item.X), y = Number(item.Y);
        if (!Number.isFinite(x) || !Number.isFinite(y)) return;
        if (isPointFogged(x, y, fogRegions)) return;
        const title = item.Name !== undefined ? String(item.Name) : key;
        addMarker(x, y, title, '📍', () => showModal(title, item, true, 'World.MapPins', key));
    });
}

// --- Interactive Map: Party Members Elsewhere ---

function renderMemberLayer(stat) {
    if (!_mapLayers) return;
    _mapLayers.members.clearLayers();
    const familiars = getV(stat, 'Familiar', {});
    const groups = {};
    Object.entries(familiars).forEach(([key, member]) => {
        if (key === '$meta' || key === '$key' || key === 'template') return;
        if (!member || typeof member !== 'object') return;
        const x = Number(member.X), y = Number(member.Y);
        if (!Number.isFinite(x) || !Number.isFinite(y)) return;
        let name = member.Name !== undefined ? member.Name : key;
        if (isTuple(name)) name = tupleVal(name);
        name = String(name);
        const groupKey = x + ',' + y;
        if (!groups[groupKey]) groups[groupKey] = { x, y, names: [] };
        groups[groupKey].names.push(name);
    });
    Object.values(groups).forEach(g => {
        const marker = L.marker([g.y, g.x], {
            icon: L.divIcon({
                className: 'map-member-icon',
                html: '<div class="map-member-bubble">👥</div>',
                iconSize: [24, 24],
                iconAnchor: [12, 12]
            })
        });
        const tooltipNode = document.createElement('span');
        tooltipNode.textContent = g.names.join(', ');
        marker.bindTooltip(tooltipNode, { direction: 'top' });
        _mapLayers.members.addLayer(marker);
    });
}

// --- Interactive Map: Party Marker ---

function renderPartyLayer(stat) {
    if (!_mapLayers) return;
    _mapLayers.party.clearLayers();
    const pos = getV(stat, 'World.PartyPosition', { X: 0, Y: 0 });
    const travel = getV(stat, 'World.Travel', { Active: false });
    const draggable = !travel.Active;

    const marker = L.marker([pos.Y, pos.X], {
        icon: L.divIcon({ className: 'map-party-icon', html: '<div class="map-party-bubble">🧭</div>', iconSize: [28, 28], iconAnchor: [14, 14] }),
        draggable: draggable,
        zIndexOffset: 1000
    });
    marker.bindTooltip('Party', { direction: 'top' });
    marker.on('dragend', (e) => {
        const ll = e.target.getLatLng();
        if (!_lastStatData) return;
        if (!_lastStatData.World) _lastStatData.World = {};
        _lastStatData.World.PartyPosition = { X: Math.round(ll.lng * 10) / 10, Y: Math.round(ll.lat * 10) / 10 };
        updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: _lastStatData });
        saveStatData(_lastStatData);
    });
    _mapLayers.party.addLayer(marker);
}

// --- Interactive Map: Settings ---

function openMapSettings() {
    if (!_lastStatData) return;
    getOrCreateCollection('World'); // World itself always exists, but keeps the pattern consistent
    const settings = getV(_lastStatData, 'World.MapSettings', { ...DEFAULT_MAP_SETTINGS });
    showModal('Map Settings', settings, true, 'World', 'MapSettings');
}

// --- Interactive Map: Journey Planning ---

function computeTravelEta(travel, mapScale) {
    const dx = travel.DestX - travel.OriginX;
    const dy = travel.DestY - travel.OriginY;
    const distanceKm = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) * mapScale;
    const etaHours = travel.SpeedKmh > 0 ? distanceKm / travel.SpeedKmh : 0;
    const elapsed = travel.ElapsedHours || 0;
    const progress = etaHours > 0 ? Math.min(1, elapsed / etaHours) : 1;
    return { distanceKm, etaHours, progress };
}

function startJourney(destX, destY, destName, vehicleKey) {
    if (!_lastStatData) return false;
    const vehicle = getV(_lastStatData, 'World.TravelOptions.' + vehicleKey, null);
    if (!vehicle) return false;
    const origin = getV(_lastStatData, 'World.PartyPosition', { X: 0, Y: 0 });
    if (!_lastStatData.World) _lastStatData.World = {};
    _lastStatData.World.Travel = {
        Active: true,
        OriginX: origin.X, OriginY: origin.Y,
        DestX: destX, DestY: destY, DestName: destName || '',
        VehicleName: vehicle.Name, VehicleMode: vehicle.Mode, SpeedKmh: vehicle.Speed,
        ElapsedHours: 0
    };
    updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: _lastStatData });
    saveStatData(_lastStatData);
    return true;
}

function arriveAtDestination() {
    if (!_lastStatData || !_lastStatData.World || !_lastStatData.World.Travel || !_lastStatData.World.Travel.Active) return;
    const travel = _lastStatData.World.Travel;
    _lastStatData.World.PartyPosition = { X: travel.DestX, Y: travel.DestY };
    travel.Active = false;
    updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: _lastStatData });
    saveStatData(_lastStatData);
}

function addTravelHours(hours) {
    if (!_lastStatData || !_lastStatData.World || !_lastStatData.World.Travel || !_lastStatData.World.Travel.Active) return;
    const travel = _lastStatData.World.Travel;
    travel.ElapsedHours = (travel.ElapsedHours || 0) + hours;
    updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: _lastStatData });
    saveStatData(_lastStatData);
}

function openTravelPlanner(destX, destY, destName) {
    if (!_lastStatData) return;
    const options = getV(_lastStatData, 'World.TravelOptions', {});
    const entries = Object.entries(options).filter(([k]) => k !== '$meta' && k !== '$key' && k !== 'template');
    if (entries.length === 0) { alert('No travel options defined yet. Add one in the Travel Options card first.'); return; }

    const { context, targetBody } = getModalContext();
    let overlay = context.document.getElementById('travel-planner-overlay');
    if (overlay) overlay.remove();

    const _cssv = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
    const _accent = _cssv.getPropertyValue('--accent-primary').trim() || '#00e5ff';
    const _bg = _cssv.getPropertyValue('--background-card').trim() || '#001f3f';
    const _text = _cssv.getPropertyValue('--text-primary').trim() || '#e0f7fa';
    const _border = _cssv.getPropertyValue('--border-color').trim() || 'rgba(0,229,255,0.3)';

    overlay = context.document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'travel-planner-overlay';
    overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed; inset:0; width:100vw; height:100dvh; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85); z-index:55000; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; padding:12px; box-sizing:border-box;';

    const box = context.document.createElement('div');
    box.style.cssText = `background:${_bg}; border:1px solid ${_accent}; padding:20px; border-radius:8px; width:90%; max-width:360px; color:${_text}; box-sizing:border-box;`;

    const title = context.document.createElement('h3');
    title.style.cssText = `margin:0 0 12px 0; color:${_accent};`;
    title.textContent = destName ? ('Travel to ' + destName) : 'Plan Journey';
    box.appendChild(title);

    const select = context.document.createElement('select');
    select.style.cssText = `width:100%; padding:6px; margin-bottom:14px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color:${_text}; border:1px solid ${_border}; border-radius:4px;`;
    entries.forEach(([key, v]) => {
        const opt = context.document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = key;
        opt.textContent = v.Name + ' (' + v.Mode + ', ' + v.Speed + ' km/h)';
        select.appendChild(opt);
    });
    box.appendChild(select);

    const row = context.document.createElement('div');
    row.style.cssText = 'display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:8px;';

    const cancelBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
    cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
    cancelBtn.style.cssText = `background:rgba(255,100,100,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(255,100,100,0.4); color:#ff6b6b; padding:6px 16px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;`;
    cancelBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();

    const confirmBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
    confirmBtn.textContent = 'Start Journey';
    confirmBtn.style.cssText = `background:rgba(0,200,100,0.2); border:1px solid rgba(0,200,100,0.5); color:#00c864; padding:6px 16px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;`;
    confirmBtn.onclick = () => {
        const ok = startJourney(destX, destY, destName, select.value);
        if (!ok) { alert('That vehicle is no longer available. Pick another.'); return; }
        overlay.remove();
    };

    row.appendChild(cancelBtn);
    row.appendChild(confirmBtn);
    box.appendChild(row);
    overlay.appendChild(box);
    overlay.onclick = (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
    targetBody.appendChild(overlay);
}

// Quadratic-bezier control point for an arced flight path: offset
// perpendicular to the origin->dest line, always bowing toward +Y (north)
// on screen so the arc reads as a flight arc rather than a random kink.
function getFlightArcControl(ox, oy, dx, dy) {
    const mx = (ox + dx) / 2, my = (oy + dy) / 2;
    const ddx = dx - ox, ddy = dy - oy;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(ddx * ddx + ddy * ddy);
    if (dist === 0) return { x: mx, y: my };
    const offset = dist * 0.2;
    let px = -ddy / dist, py = ddx / dist;
    if (py < 0) { px = -px; py = -py; }
    return { x: mx + px * offset, y: my + py * offset };
}

function getFlightArcPoint(ox, oy, dx, dy, t) {
    const c = getFlightArcControl(ox, oy, dx, dy);
    const u = 1 - t;
    return {
        x: u * u * ox + 2 * u * t * c.x + t * t * dx,
        y: u * u * oy + 2 * u * t * c.y + t * t * dy
    };
}

function renderTravelLayer(stat) {
    if (!_mapLayers) return;
    _mapLayers.travel.clearLayers();
    const travel = getV(stat, 'World.Travel', { Active: false });
    if (!travel.Active) return;
    const mapScale = Number(getV(stat, 'World.MapSettings.MapScale', 50)) || 50;
    const { progress } = computeTravelEta(travel, mapScale);
    const isFlying = travel.VehicleMode === 'Flying';

    let line;
    if (isFlying) {
        const segments = 32;
        const pts = [];
        for (let i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
            const p = getFlightArcPoint(travel.OriginX, travel.OriginY, travel.DestX, travel.DestY, i / segments);
            pts.push([p.y, p.x]);
        }
        line = L.polyline(pts, { className: 'map-travel-line', dashArray: '6,8', weight: 2 });
    } else {
        line = L.polyline(
            [[travel.OriginY, travel.OriginX], [travel.DestY, travel.DestX]],
            { className: 'map-travel-line', dashArray: '6,8', weight: 2 }
        );
    }
    _mapLayers.travel.addLayer(line);

    let curX, curY;
    if (isFlying) {
        const p = getFlightArcPoint(travel.OriginX, travel.OriginY, travel.DestX, travel.DestY, progress);
        curX = p.x; curY = p.y;
    } else {
        curX = travel.OriginX + (travel.DestX - travel.OriginX) * progress;
        curY = travel.OriginY + (travel.DestY - travel.OriginY) * progress;
    }
    const marker = L.marker([curY, curX], {
        icon: L.divIcon({ className: 'map-travel-icon', html: '<div class="map-travel-bubble">▶</div>', iconSize: [18, 18], iconAnchor: [9, 9] }),
        interactive: false
    });
    _mapLayers.travel.addLayer(marker);
}

function renderTravelPanel(stat) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('map-travel-panel');
    if (!panel) return;
    const travel = getV(stat, 'World.Travel', { Active: false });
    if (!travel.Active) { panel.style.display = 'none'; panel.innerHTML = ''; return; }

    const mapScale = Number(getV(stat, 'World.MapSettings.MapScale', 50)) || 50;
    const { distanceKm, etaHours, progress } = computeTravelEta(travel, mapScale);

    panel.style.display = 'block';
    panel.innerHTML = '';

    const info = document.createElement('div');
    info.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom:6px; font-size:0.9em;';
    info.textContent = (travel.DestName ? ('To ' + travel.DestName + ' ') : 'Traveling ') +
        'via ' + travel.VehicleName + ' — ' + distanceKm.toFixed(0) + ' km, ETA ' +
        etaHours.toFixed(1) + 'h (' + Math.round(progress * 100) + '% there)';
    panel.appendChild(info);

    const barOuter = document.createElement('div');
    barOuter.style.cssText = 'height:8px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:8px;';
    const barInner = document.createElement('div');
    barInner.style.cssText = 'height:100%; width:' + Math.round(progress * 100) + '%; background:var(--accent-primary);';
    barOuter.appendChild(barInner);
    panel.appendChild(barOuter);

    const controls = document.createElement('div');
    controls.style.cssText = 'display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap;';
    [1, 6, 24].forEach(h => {
        const btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.type = 'button';
        btn.textContent = '+' + h + 'h';
        btn.className = 'map-toolbar-btn';
        btn.onclick = () => addTravelHours(h);
        controls.appendChild(btn);
    });
    const arriveBtn = document.createElement('button');
    arriveBtn.type = 'button';
    arriveBtn.textContent = '✓ Arrived';
    arriveBtn.className = 'map-toolbar-btn';
    arriveBtn.disabled = progress < 1;
    arriveBtn.onclick = () => arriveAtDestination();
    controls.appendChild(arriveBtn);
    panel.appendChild(controls);
}

// --- Interactive Map: Fullscreen ---

let _mapFullscreenOriginalParent = null;
let _mapFullscreenOriginalNextSibling = null;

function toggleMapFullscreen() {
    const { context, targetBody } = getModalContext();
    // The container may currently live in the parent document (mid-fullscreen,
    // re-parented there by a prior call) rather than this iframe's own document.
    const container = document.getElementById('leaflet-map-container') || context.document.getElementById('leaflet-map-container');
    if (!container || !_leafletMap) return;
    const existingOverlay = context.document.getElementById('map-fullscreen-overlay');

    if (existingOverlay) {
        // Already fullscreen — restore.
        if (_mapFullscreenOriginalParent) {
            if (_mapFullscreenOriginalNextSibling) {
                _mapFullscreenOriginalParent.insertBefore(container, _mapFullscreenOriginalNextSibling);
            } else {
                _mapFullscreenOriginalParent.appendChild(container);
            }
        }
        container.style.height = '420px';
        existingOverlay.remove();
        _mapFullscreenOriginalParent = null;
        _mapFullscreenOriginalNextSibling = null;
        setTimeout(() => _leafletMap.invalidateSize(), 50);
        return;
    }

    _mapFullscreenOriginalParent = container.parentNode;
    _mapFullscreenOriginalNextSibling = container.nextSibling;

    const overlay = context.document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'map-fullscreen-overlay';
    overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed; inset:0; width:100vw; height:100dvh; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.95); z-index:58000; display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:12px; box-sizing:border-box;';

    const closeBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
    closeBtn.textContent = '✕ Close Fullscreen';
    closeBtn.className = 'map-toolbar-btn';
    closeBtn.style.cssText = 'align-self:flex-end; margin-bottom:8px;';
    closeBtn.onclick = () => toggleMapFullscreen();

    overlay.appendChild(closeBtn);
    container.style.height = '100%';
    overlay.appendChild(container);
    targetBody.appendChild(overlay);

    setTimeout(() => _leafletMap.invalidateSize(), 50);
}

// --- Pagination State ---
const _listPageState = new Map(); // Store current page per container ID
const _blockPageState = new Map(); // Store current page per block container

// ============================================
// PAGE SIZE CONFIGURATION (Change these values as needed)
// ============================================
const LIST_PAGE_SIZE = 5;   // For QuestList (simple/quest templates)
const BLOCK_PAGE_SIZE = 5;  // For Familiar-type blocks
// ============================================

// --- Merged Generic List Renderer (with Pagination) ---
function renderTemplateList(containerOrId, data, templateId, emptyText = LOCALE.empty_none, shouldFlatten = false, rootData) {
     const container = typeof containerOrId === 'string' ? document.getElementById(containerOrId) : containerOrId;
     if (!container) return;

     // Get container ID for pagination state
     const containerId = container.id || containerOrId;

     // Reset container style/class
     container.innerHTML = '';
     container.className = '';
     container.removeAttribute('style');

     // Generic "add new item" affordance (opt-in via data-allow-add="1")
     if (container.getAttribute('data-allow-add') === '1') {
         const addBtn = document.createElement('button');
         addBtn.type = 'button';
         addBtn.textContent = '+ Add';
         addBtn.className = 'map-toolbar-btn';
         addBtn.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom:8px;';
         addBtn.onclick = () => {
             const listPath = container.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || container.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';
             const prefix = container.getAttribute('data-add-key-prefix') || 'item';
             const defaultsAttr = container.getAttribute('data-add-defaults');
             let defaults = {};
             if (defaultsAttr) {
                 try { defaults = JSON.parse(defaultsAttr); } catch (e) { defaults = {}; }
             }
             const key = generateMapItemKey(prefix);
             getOrCreateCollection(listPath);
             showModal('New Item', { ...defaults }, true, listPath, key, true);
         };
         container.appendChild(addBtn);
     }

     // Handle Grid View specific styling (legacy support for existing CSS)
     if (templateId === 'tmpl-grid') {
         container.className = 'list-grid-view'; 
     } else if (templateId === 'tmpl-inventory') {
         container.className = 'list-inventory-view';
     }

     // 1. Prepare Items
     let items = [];
     
     if (!data || Object.keys(data).length === 0) {
         // Empty State
     } else {
         if (shouldFlatten) {
             // Flattening Logic (for Grid)
             function flatten(obj) {
                 let res = [];
                 if (!obj || typeof obj !== 'object') return res;
                 for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(obj)) {
                     if (key === '$meta' || key === '$key' || key === 'template' || value === null || value === undefined) continue;
                     const unwrapped = isTuple(value) ? tupleVal(value) : value;
                     if (unwrapped === null || unwrapped === undefined) continue;
                     
                     if (typeof unwrapped === 'object' && !Array.isArray(unwrapped)) {
                         // Use dictionary key as Name when item lacks its own Name/name
                         const hasName = unwrapped.Name || unwrapped.name ;
                         // Dictionary key MUST be the source of truth for $key (place it last so it overwrites any $key in unwrapped)
                         res.push({ ...(!hasName ? { Name: key } : {}), ...unwrapped, $key: key });
                     } else {
                         res.push({ name: isTuple(value) ? tupleLabel(value, key) : key, quantity: unwrapped });
                     }
                 }
                 return res;
             }
             items = flatten(data);
         } else {
             // Direct mapping (for Simple/Quest)
             for (const [key, raw] of Object.entries(data)) {
                 if (key === '$meta' || key === '$key' || key === 'template') continue;
                 items.push({ $key: key, $raw: raw });
             }
         }
     }

     if (items.length === 0) {
         // Use insertAdjacentHTML (append) rather than innerHTML= (replace) so the
         // "+ Add" button injected above (data-allow-add="1") survives the empty state.
         if (templateId === 'tmpl-grid' || templateId === 'tmpl-inventory') {
              container.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<div style="grid-column:1/-1; text-align:center; color:var(--text-secondary);">' + emptyText + '</div>');
         } else {
              container.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<div style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-secondary); padding:10px;">' + emptyText + '</div>');
         }
         return;
     }

     const tmpl = document.getElementById(templateId);
     if (!tmpl) {
         console.error('[MZSMB] Template not found:', templateId);
         return;
     }

     // --- Pagination Logic (skip for Grid) ---
     const totalItems = items.length;
     const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalItems / LIST_PAGE_SIZE);
     const isGrid = templateId === 'tmpl-grid' || templateId === 'tmpl-inventory';
     const needsPagination = !isGrid && totalItems > LIST_PAGE_SIZE;
     
     // Get or initialize current page
     let currentPage = _listPageState.get(containerId) || 0;
     // Clamp to valid range
     if (currentPage >= totalPages) currentPage = totalPages - 1;
     if (currentPage < 0) currentPage = 0;
     _listPageState.set(containerId, currentPage);
     
     // Calculate visible items (only slice if pagination is needed)
     let visibleItems;
     if (needsPagination) {
         const startIdx = currentPage * LIST_PAGE_SIZE;
         const endIdx = Math.min(startIdx + LIST_PAGE_SIZE, totalItems);
         visibleItems = items.slice(startIdx, endIdx);
     } else {
         visibleItems = items; // Show all items (e.g., for Grid)
     }

     // --- Render Function for Items ---
     const renderItems = (itemsToRender) => {
          const listPath = container.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || container.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';
          const isQuestSource = listPath.includes('Quests') || listPath.includes('quest');
         itemsToRender.forEach(item => {
             let lastUpdated = ''; let title = '', desc = '', qty = '', difficulty = '', reward = '', status = '';
             
             // Extraction Logic
             if (shouldFlatten) {
                  // Item is an object from flatten()
                  const summary = getItemSummary(item);
                  title = summary.name; // Use name as title
                  // qty
                  let qVal = Number(summary.qty);
                  if (!isNaN(qVal) && qVal >= 1) qty = 'x' + qVal;
                  
                  // Try to find other fields if they exist in the flattened object
                  // (desc intentionally omitted: grid/inventory only shows $key)
                  if (item.Difficulty !== undefined) difficulty = String(formatValue(item.Difficulty));
                  else if (item.difficulty !== undefined) difficulty = String(formatValue(item.difficulty));
                  if (item.Reward !== undefined) reward = String(formatValue(item.Reward));
                  else if (item.reward !== undefined) reward = String(formatValue(item.reward));

             } else {
                  // Item is { $key, $raw }
                  const key = item.$key;
                  const raw = item.$raw;
                  
                  title = key;

                  if (isTuple(raw)) {
                      title = tupleLabel(raw, key);
                      desc = String(formatValue(tupleVal(raw)));
                  } else {
                      // Array/Object handling
                      if (Array.isArray(data)) { // Check original data is array?
                          // Simplification: In loop of Object.entries(data), if data is array, key is index.
                          // But we want value as title if primitive.
                          if (raw && typeof raw !== 'object') {
                              title = String(raw);
                          }
                      }

                      if (raw && typeof raw === 'object') {
                          if (raw.Desc !== undefined) desc = String(formatValue(raw.Desc));
                          else if (raw.description !== undefined) desc = String(formatValue(raw.description));
                          else if (raw.name !== undefined) desc = String(formatValue(raw.name));
                          else if (raw.type !== undefined) desc = String(formatValue(raw.type));
                          
                          if (raw.Difficulty !== undefined) difficulty = String(formatValue(raw.Difficulty));
                          else if (raw.difficulty !== undefined) difficulty = String(formatValue(raw.difficulty));
                          if (raw.Reward !== undefined) reward = String(formatValue(raw.Reward));
                          else if (raw.reward !== undefined) reward = String(formatValue(raw.reward));
                           if (templateId === 'tmpl-quest' && isQuestSource) {
                               if (raw.LastUpdated !== undefined) lastUpdated = String(formatValue(raw.LastUpdated));

                               if (raw.Status !== undefined) status = String(formatValue(raw.Status));
                               else if (raw.status !== undefined) status = String(formatValue(raw.status));
                           }
                      } else if (typeof raw === 'string' || typeof raw === 'number' || typeof raw === 'boolean') {
                         if (!Array.isArray(data)) desc = String(raw);
                      }
                  }
             }

             // Clone & Fill
             const clone = tmpl.content.cloneNode(true);
             
             // Attach Click Handler for Modal
             const rootEl = clone.firstElementChild;
             const modalData = shouldFlatten ? item : (item.$raw || {});
             const allowEdit = container.getAttribute('data-allow-edit') === '1';
             const itemKey = item.$key || title;
             const listPath = container.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || container.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';

             // Fog-of-war redaction: if this item has map coordinates inside an unrevealed
             // FogRegions rectangle, hide its real text instead of showing it.
             // Use `rootData` (the stat snapshot currently being rendered, threaded through
             // from updateStatusPanel -> updateBindingsIn -> renderTemplateList) rather than
             // `_lastStatData`, which is only updated AFTER updateStatusPanel resolves and so
             // would be one render cycle stale (e.g. a level-up that just revealed a fog
             // region wouldn't be reflected here until the next tick).
             const fogStat = rootData || _lastStatData;
             const itemX = Number(modalData && modalData.X);
             const itemY = Number(modalData && modalData.Y);
             const isFogged = Number.isFinite(itemX) && Number.isFinite(itemY) &&
                 typeof getActiveFogRegions === 'function' && fogStat &&
                 isPointFogged(itemX, itemY, getActiveFogRegions(fogStat));

             if (isFogged) {
                 title = '???';
                 desc = 'Unrevealed area';
             }

             if (rootEl) {
                 if (isFogged) {
                     rootEl.style.cursor = 'default';
                     rootEl.style.filter = 'blur(2px)';
                     rootEl.style.opacity = '0.6';
                 } else {
                     rootEl.style.cursor = 'pointer';
                     rootEl.onclick = () => showModal(title, modalData, allowEdit, listPath, itemKey);
                 }
             }
             
             // Helper to safely set content
             const setSlot = (name, val, isHtml = false) => {
                 const el = clone.querySelector('[data-slot="' + name + '"]');
                 if (el) {
                     if (val) {
                         if (isHtml) el.innerHTML = val;
                         else el.textContent = val;
                         el.style.display = ''; // Un-hide if hidden
                     } else {
                         // If empty, keep hidden (or hide if not already) via CSS or logic?
                         // Our templates use style="display:none" for optional fields, so we only unhide if present.
                         // But for text/qty, usually always visible.
                     }
                 }
             };

             setSlot('title', title);
             setSlot('name', title); // Alias for Grid
             setSlot('desc', desc, true);
             setSlot('qty', qty);
             setSlot('difficulty', difficulty);
             setSlot('reward-text', reward);
              setSlot('LastUpdated', lastUpdated);
              setSlot('status', status);

              if (status) {
                  const elStatus = clone.querySelector('[data-slot="status-row"]');
                  if (elStatus) elStatus.style.display = 'block';
              }

              if (lastUpdated) {
                  const elLU = clone.querySelector('[data-slot="last-updated-row"]');
                  if (elLU) elLU.style.display = 'block';
              }

             // Special handling for parent containers of slots (like Reward wrapper)
             if (reward) {
                 const elRewardParams = clone.querySelector('[data-slot="reward"]');
                 if (elRewardParams) elRewardParams.style.display = 'block';
             }
             if (difficulty) {
                 const elDiff = clone.querySelector('[data-slot="difficulty"]');
                 if (elDiff) elDiff.style.display = 'inline-block';
             }

             // Wire up delete button (universal — works for quest, simple, grid, equipment-action)
             const allowDelete = container.getAttribute('data-allow-delete') === '1';
             const deleteBtn = clone.querySelector('.list-delete-btn:not(.action-delete-btn)');
             if (deleteBtn) {
                 if (!allowDelete || isFogged) {
                     deleteBtn.style.display = 'none';
                 } else {
                     const itemKey = item.$key || title;
                     const listPath = container.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || container.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';
                     deleteBtn.setAttribute('data-delete-key', itemKey);
                     deleteBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                         e.stopPropagation();
                         deleteListItem(listPath, itemKey);
                     };
                 }
             }

             // Wire up inventory action menu (Equip/Delete)
             const menuBtn = clone.querySelector('.item-menu-btn');
             const actionMenu = clone.querySelector('.item-action-menu');
             const actionEquipBtn = clone.querySelector('.action-equip-btn');
             const actionDeleteBtn = clone.querySelector('.action-delete-btn');

             if (menuBtn && actionMenu && !isFogged) {
                 const itemKey = item.$key || title;
                 const rawData = shouldFlatten ? item : (item.$raw || {});
                 const listPath = container.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || container.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';
                 const canEquip = rawData && (rawData.Type === 'Equipment' || rawData.Type === 'Weapon' || rawData.Type === 'Armor' || rawData.Type === 'Accessory' || rawData.Slot);

                 // Use equip icon as menu trigger for equippable items, otherwise use kebab menu.
                 menuBtn.textContent = canEquip ? '⚔' : '⋮';
                 menuBtn.title = canEquip ? 'Equip / Actions' : 'Actions';

                 const closeMenu = () => {
                     actionMenu.style.display = 'none';
                 };

                 const closeAllMenus = () => {
                     document.querySelectorAll('.item-action-menu').forEach(m => {
                         m.style.display = 'none';
                     });
                 };

                 menuBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                     e.stopPropagation();
                     const willOpen = actionMenu.style.display !== 'block';
                     closeAllMenus();
                     actionMenu.style.display = willOpen ? 'block' : 'none';
                 };

                 actionMenu.onclick = (e) => e.stopPropagation();

                 // Equip action (only if equippable)
                 if (actionEquipBtn) {
                     if (canEquip) {
                         actionEquipBtn.style.display = 'block';
                         actionEquipBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                             e.stopPropagation();
                             closeMenu();
                             if (typeof window.showEquipModal === 'function') {
                                 window.showEquipModal(itemKey, rawData, listPath);
                             }
                         };
                     }
                 }

                 // Delete action (shown only if allowDelete is enabled)
                 if (actionDeleteBtn) {
                     if (allowDelete) {
                         actionDeleteBtn.style.display = 'block';
                         actionDeleteBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                             e.stopPropagation();
                             closeMenu();
                             deleteListItem(listPath, itemKey);
                         };
                     } else {
                         actionDeleteBtn.style.display = 'none';
                     }
                 }

                 // Close any open item action menu on outside click
                 document.addEventListener('click', closeAllMenus);
             } else if (menuBtn) {
                 menuBtn.style.display = 'none';
             }

             // Wire up unequip button
             const unequipBtn = clone.querySelector('.unequip-btn');
             if (unequipBtn) {
                 if (isFogged) {
                     unequipBtn.style.display = 'none';
                 } else {
                     const itemKey = item.$key || title;
                     const rawData = shouldFlatten ? item : (item.$raw || {});
                     const listPath = container.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || container.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';

                     // listPath is the equipment container (e.g. "Mainchar.Equipment",
                     // "Familiar.Bob.Equipment", or "Mainchar.Belongings" for the Love genre).
                     // The character path is simply the parent (everything before the last segment).
                     let charPath = '';
                     if (listPath) {
                         const lastDot = listPath.lastIndexOf('.');
                         charPath = lastDot > 0 ? listPath.slice(0, lastDot) : listPath;
                     }

                     unequipBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                         e.stopPropagation();
                         if (typeof window.showUnequipConfirm === 'function') {
                             window.showUnequipConfirm(itemKey, rawData, listPath, charPath);
                         }
                     };
                 }
             }

             // Universal Binding Update (Adding Support for Dynamic Logic)
             const bindData = shouldFlatten ? item : (item.$raw || {});
             updateBindingsIn(clone, bindData, rootData);

             container.appendChild(clone);
         });
     };

     // 2. Render visible items
     renderItems(visibleItems);

     // 3. Add Pagination Controls if needed
     if (needsPagination) {
         const paginationBar = document.createElement('div');
         paginationBar.className = 'list-pagination-bar';
         paginationBar.style.cssText = 'display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:8px 4px; margin-top:8px; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);';
         
         // Previous Button
         const prevBtn = document.createElement('button');
         prevBtn.textContent = '<';
         prevBtn.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); color:#00e5ff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:1em; min-width:36px;';
         prevBtn.disabled = currentPage === 0;
         if (prevBtn.disabled) prevBtn.style.opacity = '0.3';
         prevBtn.onclick = (e) => {
             e.stopPropagation();
             if (currentPage > 0) {
                 _listPageState.set(containerId, currentPage - 1);
                 renderTemplateList(container, data, templateId, emptyText, shouldFlatten);
             }
         };
         
         // Page Indicator
         const pageIndicator = document.createElement('span');
         pageIndicator.style.cssText = 'color:var(--text-secondary); font-size:0.85em;';
         pageIndicator.textContent = (currentPage + 1) + ' / ' + totalPages;
         
         // Next Button
         const nextBtn = document.createElement('button');
         nextBtn.textContent = '>';
         nextBtn.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); color:#00e5ff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:1em; min-width:36px;';
         nextBtn.disabled = currentPage >= totalPages - 1;
         if (nextBtn.disabled) nextBtn.style.opacity = '0.3';
         nextBtn.onclick = (e) => {
             e.stopPropagation();
             if (currentPage < totalPages - 1) {
                 _listPageState.set(containerId, currentPage + 1);
                 renderTemplateList(container, data, templateId, emptyText, shouldFlatten);
             }
         };
         
         paginationBar.appendChild(prevBtn);
         paginationBar.appendChild(pageIndicator);
         paginationBar.appendChild(nextBtn);
         container.appendChild(paginationBar);
     }
}

        ﻿const tabScrollStates = {};
const tabVisited = {}; // Track which tabs have been visited
let pendingScrollReapplyTimer = null;

function selectTab(tabId, btn) {
    // Cancel stale delayed re-apply from previous tab switches.
    if (pendingScrollReapplyTimer !== null) {
        clearTimeout(pendingScrollReapplyTimer);
        pendingScrollReapplyTimer = null;
    }

    // 1. Save parent #chat scroll position for current tab
    const currentTab = document.querySelector('.tab-content.active');
    if (currentTab && currentTab.id) {
        try {
            if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) {
                const chatEl = window.parent.document.querySelector('#chat');
                if (chatEl) {
                    tabScrollStates[currentTab.id] = chatEl.scrollTop;
                }
            }
        } catch (e) { /* cross-origin */ }
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
    
    const newTab = document.getElementById(tabId);
    if (newTab) newTab.classList.add('active');
    btn.classList.add('active');

    // Leaflet sizes itself from its container's box at construction time. If the map's tab
    // wasn't active yet when initLeafletMapIfNeeded() first ran (container was display:none),
    // the map is born at zero/garbage size and stays that way until told otherwise — switching
    // back to this tab doesn't fix it on its own. Re-measure (and re-fit to the image, since
    // the locked-in zoom/center from the broken size is otherwise nonsensical) once the tab's
    // layout has actually applied.
    if (newTab && _leafletMap && newTab.querySelector('#leaflet-map-container')) {
        setTimeout(() => {
            _leafletMap.invalidateSize();
            if (_mapImageOverlay) _leafletMap.fitBounds(_mapImageOverlay.getBounds());
        }, 50);
    }

    // If selecting a collection tab, always reset list/block paging and scroll to top.
    const isCollectionTab = (() => {
        if (!newTab) return false;
        const bindRoots = newTab.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-root]');
        for (const el of bindRoots) {
            const root = el.getAttribute('data-bind-root');
            if (root && (COLLECTION_PATHS.has(root) || COLLECTION_PATHS.has('.' + root))) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    })();
    
    // 2. Set parent #chat scroll based on visit history
    try {
        if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) {
            const chatEl = window.parent.document.querySelector('#chat');
            if (chatEl) {
                let targetY = 0;
                const chatRect = chatEl.getBoundingClientRect();
                
                // First-time visits → scroll to iframe position (top of status menu, not top of chat)
                if (!tabVisited[tabId]) {
                    const iframe = window.frameElement;
                    if (iframe) {
                        const iframeRect = iframe.getBoundingClientRect();
                        targetY = chatEl.scrollTop + iframeRect.top - chatRect.top;
                    }
                }
                // Previously visited tabs → restore saved position
                else if (tabScrollStates[tabId] !== undefined) {
                    targetY = tabScrollStates[tabId];
                }
                
                // Mark this tab as visited
                tabVisited[tabId] = true;
                
                // Apply scroll immediately (may be clamped if collection tab content hasn't rendered yet)
                const maxScrollTop = chatEl.scrollHeight - chatEl.clientHeight;
                const wasClamped = targetY > maxScrollTop;
                chatEl.scrollTop = targetY;

                // If clamped, the tab's content (e.g. a long Partner list) hasn't fully rendered yet.
                // Re-apply after 150ms once scrollHeight has expanded, recalculating from fresh measurements.
                if (wasClamped) {
                    pendingScrollReapplyTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                        try {
                            const iframe = window.frameElement;
                            if (iframe) {
                                const freshIframeRect = iframe.getBoundingClientRect();
                                const freshChatRect = chatEl.getBoundingClientRect();
                                const freshTargetY = chatEl.scrollTop + freshIframeRect.top - freshChatRect.top;
                                const freshMax = chatEl.scrollHeight - chatEl.clientHeight;
                                chatEl.scrollTop = Math.max(0, Math.min(freshTargetY, freshMax));
                            }
                        } catch(e) { /* cross-origin */ }
                        pendingScrollReapplyTimer = null;
                    }, 150);
                }

            }
        }
    } catch (e) { /* cross-origin */ }
    
    // Also reset internal scroll in case there's no iframe wrapper
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
    document.documentElement.scrollTop = 0;
    document.body.scrollTop = 0;

    // Leaflet needs to recompute its size after its container becomes visible again
    if (_leafletMap) {
        setTimeout(() => _leafletMap.invalidateSize(), 50);
    }
}

function showModal(title, data, allowEdit, listPath, itemKey, startInEdit = false) {

    // Try to access parent context (SillyTavern) for better positioning in iframe

    // Check for existing modal or create new one
    let overlay = context.document.getElementById('detail-modal-overlay');
    if (!overlay) {

        const content = context.document.createElement('div');
        content.id = 'detail-modal-content';
        content.style.cssText = `background:${_bg}; border:1px solid ${_accent}; padding:20px; border-radius:8px; width:90%; max-width:min(500px, calc(100vw - 24px)); max-height:calc(100vh - 24px); overflow:auto; color:${_text}; position:relative; box-shadow:0 0 20px ${_border}; box-sizing:border-box;`;
        
        const header = context.document.createElement('div');
        header.style.cssText = `display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:15px; padding-bottom:10px; border-bottom:1px solid ${_border};`;
        
        const titleEl = context.document.createElement('h3');
        titleEl.id = 'detail-modal-title';
        titleEl.style.cssText = `margin:0; color:${_accent}; font-weight:600;`;
        
        const closeBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
        closeBtn.textContent = '×';
        closeBtn.style.cssText = 'background:none; border:none; color:#fff; font-size:1.5em; cursor:pointer; padding:0 5px;';
        closeBtn.onclick = () => {
            overlay.style.display = 'none';
            if (context !== window) overlay.remove(); // Clean up if in parent
        };
        
        header.appendChild(titleEl);
        header.appendChild(closeBtn);
        
        const body = context.document.createElement('div');
        body.id = 'detail-modal-body';

        const footer = context.document.createElement('div');
        footer.id = 'detail-modal-footer';
        footer.style.cssText = 'margin-top:15px; display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:8px;';
        
        content.appendChild(header);
        content.appendChild(body);
        content.appendChild(footer);
        overlay.appendChild(content);
        
        // Close on overlay click
        overlay.onclick = (e) => {
            if (e.target === overlay) {
                overlay.style.display = 'none';
                if (context !== window) overlay.remove();
            }
        };
        
        targetBody.appendChild(overlay);
    }
    
    const elTitle = context.document.getElementById('detail-modal-title');
    const elBody = context.document.getElementById('detail-modal-body');
    const elFooter = context.document.getElementById('detail-modal-footer');
    
    if (!elTitle || !elBody) return;
    
    elTitle.textContent = title;
    elBody.innerHTML = '';
    if (elFooter) elFooter.innerHTML = '';

    // Sanitize text to prevent XSS when inserting into HTML
    const esc = (s) => String(s).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"');
    
    // Recursive formatter with inline styles (read-only view)
    const formatData = (obj) => {
        if (obj === null || obj === undefined) return '<span style="color:#666">null</span>';
        if (typeof obj !== 'object') return esc(String(obj));
        
        let html = '';
        if (Array.isArray(obj)) {
            html += '<div style="padding-left:10px; border-left:1px solid #333">';
            obj.forEach((v, i) => {
                html += `<div><span style="color:#888">[${i}]</span> ${formatData(v)}</div>`;
            });
            html += '</div>';
        } else {
            html += `<div style="padding-left:10px; border-left:2px solid ${_accent}">`;
            for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(obj)) {
                if (k === '$meta' || k === 'template' || k === '$key' || k === 'name') continue;
                 html += `<div style="padding:4px 0; border-bottom:1px dotted rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><span style="color:${_accent}; font-weight:bold;">${esc(k)}:</span> <span style="color:#fff;">${formatData(v)}</span></div>`;
            }
            html += '</div>';
        }
        return html;
    };

    // Build editable form (flat key-value inputs for top-level fields)
    const buildEditForm = (obj) => {
        const wrap = context.document.createElement('div');
        wrap.style.cssText = `padding-left:10px; border-left:2px solid ${_accent};`;
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(obj)) {
            if (k === '$meta' || k === 'template' || k === '$key' || k === 'name') continue;
            const row = context.document.createElement('div');
            row.style.cssText = 'padding:4px 0; border-bottom:1px dotted rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:8px;';
            
            const label = context.document.createElement('span');
            label.style.cssText = `color:${_accent}; font-weight:bold; min-width:80px; padding-top:6px; flex-shrink:0;`;
            label.textContent = k + ':';
            
            const isObj = v !== null && typeof v === 'object';
            // Always use textarea: easier to edit long strings, still fine for short ones
            const input = context.document.createElement('textarea');
            input.setAttribute('data-field', k);
            input.style.cssText = `flex:1; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border:1px solid ${_border}; color:${_text}; padding:4px 8px; border-radius:4px; font-size:0.9em; font-family:inherit; resize:vertical; box-sizing:border-box;`;
            if (isObj) {
                input.value = JSON.stringify(v, null, 2);
            } else {
                input.value = v === null || v === undefined ? '' : String(v);
            }
            // Auto-size: rows based on content length and newlines
            const lines = input.value.split('\n').length;
            const charsPerRow = 40; // rough estimate for wrapping
            const wrappedRows = Math.ceil(input.value.length / charsPerRow);
            input.rows = Math.min(12, Math.max(2, lines, wrappedRows));

            row.appendChild(label);
            row.appendChild(input);
            wrap.appendChild(row);
        }
        return wrap;
    };
    
    // Render read-only view
    elBody.innerHTML = formatData(data);

    // Add Edit button if allowEdit is enabled
    if (allowEdit && elFooter && listPath && itemKey) {
        const editBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
        editBtn.textContent = '✏ Edit';
        editBtn.style.cssText = `background:rgba(0,229,255,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.4); color:#00e5ff; padding:6px 16px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.9em;`;
        
        const enterEditMode = () => {
            // Switch to edit mode
            elBody.innerHTML = '';
            const form = buildEditForm(data);
            elBody.appendChild(form);
            elFooter.innerHTML = '';
            
            const saveBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
            saveBtn.textContent = '💾 Save';
            saveBtn.style.cssText = `background:rgba(0,200,100,0.2); border:1px solid rgba(0,200,100,0.5); color:#00c864; padding:6px 16px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.9em;`;
            
            const cancelBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
            cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
            cancelBtn.style.cssText = `background:rgba(255,100,100,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(255,100,100,0.4); color:#ff6b6b; padding:6px 16px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.9em;`;
            
            cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
                // Revert to read-only view
                elBody.innerHTML = formatData(data);
                elFooter.innerHTML = '';
                elFooter.appendChild(editBtn);
            };
            
            saveBtn.onclick = () => {
                if (!_lastStatData) { console.error('[MZSMB] No stat data'); return; }
                
                // Navigate to the item in stat data
                const fullPath = listPath + '.' + itemKey;
                const parts = fullPath.split('.').filter(p => p);
                let target = _lastStatData;
                for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
                    if (target && target[parts[i]] !== undefined) {
                        target = target[parts[i]];
                    } else {
                        console.error('[MZSMB] Edit navigation failed at:', parts[i]);
                        return;
                    }
                }
                const lastKey = parts[parts.length - 1];
                if (!target || typeof target !== 'object') { console.error('[MZSMB] Edit target not found'); return; }
                
                // Collect edited values from form inputs
                const inputs = form.querySelectorAll('[data-field]');
                const updated = {};
                inputs.forEach(inp => {
                    const field = inp.getAttribute('data-field');
                    let val = inp.value;
                    // Try to preserve types: number, boolean, JSON object
                    if (val === 'true') val = true;
                    else if (val === 'false') val = false;
                    else if (val !== '' && !isNaN(Number(val)) && val.trim() !== '') val = Number(val);
                    else {
                        try { const parsed = JSON.parse(val); if (typeof parsed === 'object') val = parsed; } catch(e) { /* keep as string */ }
                    }
                    updated[field] = val;
                });
                
                // Merge updates — preserve fields not shown in the form (like $key, name, $meta)
                const currentItem = target[lastKey];
                if (typeof currentItem === 'object' && currentItem !== null) {
                    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(updated)) {
                        currentItem[k] = v;
                    }
                } else {
                    target[lastKey] = updated;
                }
                
                // Re-render and save
                updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: _lastStatData });
                saveStatData(_lastStatData);
                
                // Update local data reference and switch back to read-only
                Object.assign(data, updated);
                elBody.innerHTML = formatData(data);
                elFooter.innerHTML = '';
                elFooter.appendChild(editBtn);
            };
            
            elFooter.appendChild(cancelBtn);
            elFooter.appendChild(saveBtn);
        };

        editBtn.onclick = enterEditMode;
        elFooter.appendChild(editBtn);

        if (startInEdit) enterEditMode();
    }

    overlay.style.display = 'flex';
}

// Initialize: Mark the first active tab as visited
(function initTabTracking() {
