    if (initialTab && initialTab.id) {
        tabVisited[initialTab.id] = true;
    }
})();

        ﻿// Helper to create pagination controls
function createBlockPaginationBar(containerId, currentPage, totalPages, data, templateId, position, allItems, effectivePageSize) {
    const bar = document.createElement('div');
    bar.className = 'block-pagination-bar';
    // Use width:100% and flex properties to ensure it spans full width in grid/flex containers
    bar.style.cssText = 'display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:6px 4px; width:100%; flex-basis:100%; flex-shrink:0; box-sizing:border-box; ' + 
        (position === 'top' ? 'margin-bottom:8px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);' : 'margin-top:8px; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);');

    // Previous Button
    const prevBtn = document.createElement('button');
    prevBtn.textContent = '<';
    prevBtn.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); color:#00e5ff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:1em; min-width:36px;';
    prevBtn.disabled = currentPage === 0;
    if (prevBtn.disabled) prevBtn.style.opacity = '0.3';
    prevBtn.onclick = (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        if (currentPage > 0) {
            _blockPageState.set(containerId, currentPage - 1);
            renderBlock(containerId, data, templateId);
        }
    };

    // Page Indicator
    const pageIndicator = document.createElement('span');
    pageIndicator.style.cssText = 'color:var(--text-secondary); font-size:0.85em;';
    pageIndicator.textContent = (currentPage + 1) + ' / ' + totalPages;

    // Next Button
    const nextBtn = document.createElement('button');
    nextBtn.textContent = '>';
    nextBtn.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); color:#00e5ff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:1em; min-width:36px;';
    nextBtn.disabled = currentPage >= totalPages - 1;
    if (nextBtn.disabled) nextBtn.style.opacity = '0.3';
    nextBtn.onclick = (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        if (currentPage < totalPages - 1) {
            _blockPageState.set(containerId, currentPage + 1);
            renderBlock(containerId, data, templateId);
        }
    };

    bar.appendChild(prevBtn);

    // Quick-Jump Dropdown (top bar only)
    if (position === 'top' && allItems && allItems.length > 0) {
        const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
        const showQuickJump = container && container.getAttribute('data-quick-jump') === '1';
        if (showQuickJump) {
            const jumpSelect = document.createElement('select');
            jumpSelect.className = 'block-jump-select';
            const firstVisibleIdx = currentPage * effectivePageSize;
            for (let i = 0; i < allItems.length; i++) {
                const opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.value = String(i);
                opt.style.background = '#1a1d24';
                opt.style.color = '#e0e0e0';
                const item = allItems[i];
                const name = (item.Name ? (Array.isArray(item.Name) ? item.Name[0] : item.Name) : null) || item.$key || ('Item ' + (i + 1));
                opt.textContent = name;
                if (i === firstVisibleIdx) opt.selected = true;
                jumpSelect.appendChild(opt);
            }
            jumpSelect.onchange = () => {
                const selectedIdx = parseInt(jumpSelect.value, 10);
                const targetPage = Math.floor(selectedIdx / effectivePageSize);
                const currentPage = _blockPageState.get(containerId) || 0;
                // Only rebuild DOM if the page actually changes
                if (targetPage !== currentPage) {
                    _blockPageState.set(containerId, targetPage);
                    renderBlock(containerId, data, templateId);
                    // Restore the selection on the newly-rendered select (renderBlock rebuilds DOM)
                    const newContainer = document.getElementById(containerId);
                    if (newContainer) {
                        const newSelect = newContainer.querySelector('.block-jump-select');
                        if (newSelect) newSelect.value = String(selectedIdx);
                    }
                }
                // Scroll in RAF so DOM layout is stable before measuring positions
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    const anchorId = containerId + '-item-' + selectedIdx;
                    const anchor = document.getElementById(anchorId);
                    if (anchor) {
                        const chatEl = window.parent && window.parent.document && window.parent.document.querySelector('#chat');
                        if (chatEl) {
                            const iframeEl = window.frameElement;
                            const iframeRect = iframeEl ? iframeEl.getBoundingClientRect() : { top: 0 };
                            const chatRect = chatEl.getBoundingClientRect();
                            const anchorRect = anchor.getBoundingClientRect();
                            const scrollDelta = (iframeRect.top + anchorRect.top) - chatRect.top - 8;
                            chatEl.scrollTop += scrollDelta;
                        } else {
                            anchor.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
                        }
                    }
                });
            };
            bar.appendChild(jumpSelect);
        }
    }

    bar.appendChild(pageIndicator);
    bar.appendChild(nextBtn);
    return bar;
}

function renderBlock(containerId, data, templateId, rootData) {
     const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
     const template = document.getElementById(templateId);
     if (!container || !template) return;
     
     container.innerHTML = '';
     if (!data || (typeof data === 'object' && Object.keys(data).length === 0)) {
         container.innerHTML = '<div style="width:100%; text-align:center; padding:10px; color:#666;">No Data</div>';
         return;
     }

     // Determine items to loop
     let items = [];
     if (Array.isArray(data)) {
         items = data;
     } else if (typeof data === 'object') {
         // STRICT MODE: Check Schema (COLLECTION_PATHS)
         const rootKey = container.getAttribute('data-bind-root');
         const isSchemaCollection = COLLECTION_PATHS.has(rootKey) || COLLECTION_PATHS.has('.' + rootKey);
         
         if (!isSchemaCollection) {
            items = [data]; // Treat as single Record
         } else {
             // It is a Collection -> Loop values
             items = Object.entries(data)
                 .filter(([k, v]) => k !== '$meta' && k !== '$key' && k !== 'template' && v && typeof v === 'object' && !Array.isArray(v))
                 .map(([k, v]) => ({ $key: k, ...v }));
         }
     } else {
         items = [data];
     }

     if (items.length === 0) {
         container.innerHTML = '<div style="width:100%; text-align:center; padding:10px; color:#666;">No Data</div>';
         return;
     }

     // --- Block Pagination Logic ---
     const totalItems = items.length;
     const effectivePageSize = parseInt(container.getAttribute('data-page-size'), 10) || BLOCK_PAGE_SIZE;
     const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalItems / effectivePageSize);
     const needsPagination = totalItems > effectivePageSize;

     let currentPage = _blockPageState.get(containerId) || 0;
     if (currentPage >= totalPages) currentPage = totalPages - 1;
     if (currentPage < 0) currentPage = 0;
     _blockPageState.set(containerId, currentPage);

     const startIdx = needsPagination ? currentPage * effectivePageSize : 0;
     const endIdx = needsPagination ? Math.min(startIdx + effectivePageSize, totalItems) : totalItems;
     const visibleItems = items.slice(startIdx, endIdx);

     // Add TOP pagination bar
     if (needsPagination) {
         container.appendChild(createBlockPaginationBar(containerId, currentPage, totalPages, data, templateId, 'top', items, effectivePageSize));
     } else if (container.getAttribute('data-quick-jump') === '1' && items.length > 0) {
         // Show quick-jump dropdown even without pagination (e.g. single item collections)
         container.appendChild(createBlockPaginationBar(containerId, currentPage, totalPages, data, templateId, 'top', items, effectivePageSize));
     }

     // Render visible items
     for (let i = 0; i < visibleItems.length; i++) {
         const item = visibleItems[i];
         const globalIdx = startIdx + i;
         const anchor = document.createElement('div');
         anchor.id = containerId + '-item-' + globalIdx;
         anchor.style.cssText = 'height:0;margin:0;padding:0;width:100%;flex-basis:100%;flex-shrink:0;';
         container.appendChild(anchor);
         const clone = template.content.cloneNode(true);
         const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
         wrapper.style.display = 'contents';
         wrapper.appendChild(clone);
         container.appendChild(wrapper);
         updateBindingsIn(wrapper, item, rootData);
     }

     // Add BOTTOM pagination bar
     if (needsPagination) {
         container.appendChild(createBlockPaginationBar(containerId, currentPage, totalPages, data, templateId, 'bottom', items, effectivePageSize));
     }

     // After rendering, scroll the parent tab to top if this is a collection in the active tab
     const rootKey = container.getAttribute('data-bind-root');
     const isCollection = COLLECTION_PATHS.has(rootKey) || COLLECTION_PATHS.has('.' + rootKey);
     if (isCollection) {
         const parentTab = container.closest('.tab-content');
         if (parentTab && parentTab.classList.contains('active')) {
             // Use requestAnimationFrame to ensure scroll happens after browser layout
             requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                 parentTab.scrollTop = 0;
             });
         }
     }
}

        ﻿// --- Collapse State Persistence ---
// Keyed by data-target (list ID). Stores true=open, false=closed.
// Survives renderBlock re-renders so user-toggled state is preserved.
const _collapseState = new Map();

function updateBindingsIn(root, data, rootData) {
     if (!root || !data) return;
     
    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-val]').forEach(el => {
        const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-val');
        if (path !== null) { 
            const val = getV(data, path, '???');
            el.textContent = val;
        }
    });

    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-label]').forEach(el => {
        const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-label');
        if (path !== null) {
            const label = getL(data, path, null);
            if (label) el.textContent = label;
        }
    });

    // --- Inject $key into fullpaths for nested components ---
    if (data.$key) {
        root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-list-fullpath]').forEach(el => {
            const fullpath = el.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath');
            // For example, fullpath might be "Familiar.Equipment"
            // And data.$key is "Bob"
            // We need it to be "Familiar.Bob.Equipment"
            // To do this simply, we assume any nested list inside a collection is relative to that collection's root.
            // A quick heuristic: if the first part of the full path matches the root collection (Familiar), insert the key.
            // Though actually, if it's rendered here, it *must* belong to this item.
            if (fullpath && !fullpath.includes('.' + data.$key + '.')) {
                const parts = fullpath.split('.');
                if (parts.length > 1) {
                    // parts[0] is root (e.g. Familiar), parts[1] is prop (e.g. Equipment)
                    // insert $key after root
                    parts.splice(1, 0, data.$key);
                    el.setAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath', parts.join('.'));
                }
            }
        });

        // Do the same for data-bind-fullpath (e.g., checkboxes inside grid items)
        root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-fullpath]').forEach(el => {
            const fullpath = el.getAttribute('data-bind-fullpath');
             if (fullpath && !fullpath.includes('.' + data.$key) && fullpath !== data.$key) {
                const parts = fullpath.split('.');
                if (parts.length > 1) {
                    parts.splice(1, 0, data.$key);
                    el.setAttribute('data-bind-fullpath', parts.join('.'));
                } else if (parts.length === 1) {
                    // If it's just 'Familiar', make it 'Familiar.Bob'
                    el.setAttribute('data-bind-fullpath', parts[0] + '.' + data.$key);
                }
            }
        });
    }

    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-curr]').forEach(el => {
         const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-curr');
         if(path !== null) el.textContent = getV(data, path, 0);
    });
    
    // --- Image Edit & Popup Handlers ---
    // We attach the data source to the element for the handler to read
    root.querySelectorAll('.img-edit-btn').forEach(el => {
        // Store the current data context 
        // We can't easily pass the whole object, but we can pass the key if it exists
        if (data.$key) el.dataset.key = data.$key;
    });

    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-max]').forEach(el => {
         const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-max');
         if(path !== null) el.textContent = getV(data, path, 100);
    });
    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-bar]').forEach(el => {
        const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-bar');
        if (path !== null) {
            const explicitMaxPath = el.getAttribute('data-bind-bar-max');
            let maxPath;
            if (explicitMaxPath) {
                maxPath = explicitMaxPath;
            } else {
                maxPath = path.replace('_curr', '_max');
                if (maxPath === path) maxPath = path + '_max';
            }
            const cur = Number(getV(data, path, 0)) || 0;
            const max = Number(getV(data, maxPath, 100)) || 100;
            const pct = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, (cur / max) * 100));
            el.style.width = pct + '%';
        }
    });

    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-img]').forEach(el => {
        const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-img');
        if (path !== null) {
            // --- Image Loading Priority ---
            // 1. localStorage (local files uploaded by user, base64 data: URIs)
            // 2. MVU variable (URLs, synced across sessions)
            // 3. Placeholder (when no image is set)
            let url = '';
            
            // For localStorage lookup, use the full path from parent wrapper
            // This matches the key used when saving in rt_modalUi.js
            const wrapper = el.closest('[data-bind-fullpath]');
            const fullPath = wrapper ? wrapper.getAttribute('data-bind-fullpath') : path;
            
            try {
                const cached = localStorage.getItem('mzsb_img_' + fullPath);
                if (cached) url = cached;
            } catch (e) {}
            
            if (!url) {
                url = getV(data, path, '');
                if(Array.isArray(url)) url = url[0];
            }
            
            if (url && url !== 'N/A') {
                el.src = url;
                el.style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                // Show placeholder when no image is set
                el.src = "data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 200'%3E%3Crect fill='%23e0e0e0' width='300' height='200'/%3E%3Ctext x='50%25' y='50%25' text-anchor='middle' dy='0.3em' fill='%23999' font-size='16' font-family='sans-serif'%3ENo Image%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E";
                el.style.display = 'block';
            }
        }
    });

    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-checked]').forEach(el => {
        const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-checked');
        if (path !== null) {
            const val = getV(data, path, false);
            el.checked = Boolean(val);
        }
        
        // Attach save handler dynamically
        const saveRoot = el.getAttribute('data-save-root');
        const saveLeaf = el.getAttribute('data-save-leaf');
        
        if (saveRoot || saveLeaf) {
             el.onclick = () => {
                 let fullPath = saveLeaf || '';
                 if (data.$key && saveRoot) {
                     // Collection Item: Root + Key + Leaf
                     fullPath = saveRoot + '.' + data.$key + '.' + saveLeaf;
                 } else if (saveRoot) {
                     // Single Item / Global: Root + Leaf
                     fullPath = saveRoot + '.' + saveLeaf;
                 } else {
                     // No root: just leaf (global variable?)
                     fullPath = saveLeaf;
                 }
                 applyValueUpdate(fullPath, el.checked);
             };
        }
    });
    
    // --- Dynamic Logic Execution (Phase 2) ---
    root.querySelectorAll('[data-dynamic-logic]').forEach(el => {
        const encodedLogic = el.getAttribute('data-dynamic-logic');
        if (encodedLogic) {
            try {
                const logic = atob(encodedLogic);
                // Safe execution context
                // We provide _output as a variable for the user to assign to.
                // We also provide 'el' for advanced direct manipulation if needed.
                const userFn = new Function('stat', 'getV', 'getL', 'getRaw', '_', 'el', 'root', 
                    'let _output = undefined; ' + 
                    logic + 
                    '; return _output;'
                );
                
                const result = userFn(data, getV, getL, getRaw, _, el, rootData);
                


                
                // MAGIC LOOKUP: If this card is a Lorebook card, try to map the result (key) to content
                let finalResult = result;
                if (el.hasAttribute('data-lb-key')) {
                    const keyStr = String(result).trim().toLowerCase();


                    // 1. Check Cache (Sync)
                    if (window._lbContentCache && window._lbContentCache.has(keyStr)) {
                        finalResult = window._lbContentCache.get(keyStr);

                    } else {
                        // 2. Async Fallback: Trigger fetch if not found

                        fetchLorebookContent(keyStr).then(content => {
                            if (content) {

                                // Update Cache
                                if (window._lbContentCache) window._lbContentCache.set(keyStr, content);
                                
                                // Update Element
                                if (el.tagName === 'IMG') {
                                    el.src = content;
                                    el.style.display = 'block';
                                } else {
                                    el.innerHTML = content;
                                }
                            } else {
                                console.warn('[MZSMB] Magic Lookup: Async fetch returned null for:', keyStr);
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }

                if (finalResult !== undefined) {
                    if (el.tagName === 'IMG') {
                        // Only set src if it looks like a URL.
                        // Lorebook keys (e.g. 'pre-70-map') are NOT URLs and
                        // would cause 404s if assigned to src directly.
                        const strResult = String(finalResult);
                        if (strResult.startsWith('http://') || strResult.startsWith('https://') || strResult.startsWith('data:')) {
                            el.src = finalResult;
                            el.style.display = 'block';
                        } else {
                            // It's a lorebook key — hide img until async fetch resolves
                            el.style.display = 'none';
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Allow HTML injection for RichText/StatRow
                        el.innerHTML = finalResult;
                    }
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("[MZSMB] Dynamic Logic Error:", e);
                el.textContent = "Logic Error: " + e.message;
                el.style.color = 'red';
            }
        }
    });

     // 4. Generic Lists (Simple & Grid & Quest & Custom & Equipment & Inventory)
    const listTypeMap = {
        'simple': (cid, data, txn, rootData) => renderTemplateList(cid, data, 'tmpl-simple', txn, false, rootData),
        'grid': (cid, data, txn, rootData) => renderTemplateList(cid, data, 'tmpl-grid', txn, true, rootData),
        'inventory': (cid, data, txn, rootData) => renderTemplateList(cid, data, 'tmpl-inventory', txn, true, rootData),
        'equipment-action': (cid, data, txn, rootData) => renderTemplateList(cid, data, 'tmpl-equipment-action', txn, false, rootData),
        'quest': (cid, data, txn, rootData) => renderTemplateList(cid, data, 'tmpl-quest', txn, false, rootData)
    };

    root.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-list]').forEach(el => {
        const path = el.getAttribute('data-bind-list');
        const type = el.getAttribute('data-list-type') || 'simple';
        const emptyText = LOCALE['empty_' + type] || LOCALE.empty_none;
        
        if (path !== null) {
            // Use getListData to avoid aggressive tuple unwrapping
            const listData = getListData(data, path, {});
            
            // Check for custom-* type
            if (type.startsWith('custom-')) {
                const customName = type.substring(7); // strip 'custom-'
                const customTmplId = 'tmpl-custom-' + customName;
                const customTmpl = document.getElementById(customTmplId);
                
                if (customTmpl) {
                    // Use custom template with data-bind rendering
                    renderCustomTemplateList(el, listData, customTmplId, emptyText, rootData);
                } else {
                    // Fallback: show error banner + render with tmpl-simple
                    const errorBanner = document.createElement('div');
                    errorBanner.style.cssText = 'background:#ff525233; border:1px solid #ff5252; color:#ff8a80; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:4px; margin-bottom:8px; font-size:0.85em;';
                    errorBanner.textContent = '⚠ Custom template "' + customName + '" not found. Using fallback.';
                    el.appendChild(errorBanner);
                    renderTemplateList(el, listData, 'tmpl-simple', emptyText, false);
                }
            } else {
                const renderer = listTypeMap[type] || listTypeMap['simple'];
                renderer(el, listData, emptyText, rootData);
            }
        }
    });
    
    // --- Collapsible List Headers ---
    root.querySelectorAll('.list-collapse-header').forEach(header => {
        const targetId = header.getAttribute('data-target') || '';

        if (header.dataset.collapseInit) return;
        header.dataset.collapseInit = '1';

        // Restore persisted open/close state if available (overrides template default)
        if (targetId && _collapseState.has(targetId)) {
            const body = header.nextElementSibling;
            const arrow = header.querySelector('.list-collapse-arrow');
            const isOpen = _collapseState.get(targetId);
            if (body) body.style.display = isOpen ? '' : 'none';
            if (arrow) arrow.textContent = isOpen ? '▼' : '▶';
        }

        header.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const body = header.nextElementSibling;
            const arrow = header.querySelector('.list-collapse-arrow');
            if (!body) return;
            const isHidden = body.style.display === 'none';
            body.style.display = isHidden ? '' : 'none';
            if (arrow) arrow.textContent = isHidden ? '▼' : '▶';
            // Persist so re-renders restore the same state
            if (targetId) _collapseState.set(targetId, isHidden); // isHidden → we are opening it
        });
    });

    // --- Custom Template Renderer (data-bind based) ---
    function renderCustomTemplateList(container, data, templateId, emptyText, rootData) {

        container.innerHTML = '';
        
        let items = [];
        if (data && Object.keys(data).length > 0) {
            for (const [key, raw] of Object.entries(data)) {
                if (key === '$meta' || key === 'template') continue;
                items.push({ $key: key, $raw: raw });
            }
        }
        
        
        if (items.length === 0) {
            container.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-secondary); padding:10px;">' + emptyText + '</div>';
            return;
        }
        
        const tmpl = document.getElementById(templateId);

        if (!tmpl) return;
        
        items.forEach(item => {
            const clone = tmpl.content.cloneNode(true);
            const raw = item.$raw;
            
            // Build a flat field map from the item's data
            const fieldMap = { '$key': item.$key };
            if (raw && typeof raw === 'object' && !Array.isArray(raw)) {
                for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(raw)) {
                    if (k === '$meta') continue;
                    fieldMap[k] = isTuple(v) ? formatValue(tupleVal(v)) : formatValue(v);
                }
            } else if (raw !== null && raw !== undefined) {
                fieldMap['$value'] = isTuple(raw) ? formatValue(tupleVal(raw)) : formatValue(raw);
            }
            

            
            // Fill all data-bind elements
            clone.querySelectorAll('[data-bind]').forEach(bindEl => {
                const field = bindEl.getAttribute('data-bind');

                if (field && fieldMap[field] !== undefined) {
                    bindEl.textContent = String(fieldMap[field]);
                    bindEl.style.display = '';
                } else if (field && fieldMap[field] === undefined) {
                    // Hide elements whose field doesn't exist in this item
                    bindEl.textContent = '';
                }
            });
            
            // Attach click handler for modal
            const rootEl = clone.firstElementChild;
            if (rootEl) {
                rootEl.style.cursor = 'pointer';
                const modalData = raw || {};
                const allowEdit = container.getAttribute('data-allow-edit') === '1';
                const listPath = container.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || container.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';
                rootEl.onclick = () => showModal(item.$key, modalData, allowEdit, listPath, item.$key);
            }
            
            container.appendChild(clone);
        });
    }
}

        ﻿// --- Lorebook Logic (Refactored Phase 6) ---
const _lbContentCache = new Map(); // Cache content, not just images

// Generic function to retrieve simple string content from a Lorebook Entry
async function fetchLorebookContent(key) {
    if (!key) return null;
    const searchKey = String(key).trim().toLowerCase();
    if (_lbContentCache.has(searchKey)) return _lbContentCache.get(searchKey);
    


    try {
        // API Discovery (Match statusmenu.html exactly)
        const _getPrimaryBook = (typeof getCurrentCharPrimaryLorebook === 'function')
            ? getCurrentCharPrimaryLorebook
            : (window.parent && window.parent.getCurrentCharPrimaryLorebook);

        const _getEntries = (typeof getLorebookEntries === 'function')
            ? getLorebookEntries
            : (window.parent && window.parent.getLorebookEntries);

        if (typeof _getPrimaryBook === 'function' && typeof _getEntries === 'function') {
            const bookName = await _getPrimaryBook();
            // console.log("[MZSMB] [LB] Primary Book:", bookName);
            if (bookName) {
                const entries = await _getEntries(bookName);
                if (Array.isArray(entries)) {
                     const entry = entries.find(e => {
                         // Check Keys (Array)
                         if (Array.isArray(e.keys)) {
                             if (e.keys.some(k => k.trim().toLowerCase() === searchKey)) return true;
                         }
                         // Check Comment
                         if (e.comment && e.comment.trim().toLowerCase() === searchKey) return true;
                         return false;
                     });
                     
                     if (entry && entry.content) {
                         const content = entry.content.trim();
                         _lbContentCache.set(searchKey, content);
                         return content;
                     }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch(e) { console.error("[MZSMB][LB] Fetch Error:", e); }
    return null;
}

async function updateLorebookContent(root) {
    if (!root) return;
    const lbEls = root.querySelectorAll('[data-lb-key], [data-lb-text-key]');
    for (const el of lbEls) {
        const key = el.getAttribute('data-lb-key') || el.getAttribute('data-lb-text-key');
        if (key) {
            const content = await fetchLorebookContent(key);
            if (content) {
                 if (el.tagName === 'IMG') {
                      // Image handling (URL validation)
                      if (content.toLowerCase().startsWith('http://') || content.toLowerCase().startsWith('https://')) {
                          if (el.src !== content) {
                              el.src = content;
                              el.style.display = 'block';
                          }
                      }
                 } else {
                      // Text handling (RichText / StatRow)
                      if (el.innerHTML !== content) {
                          el.innerHTML = content;
                      }
                 }
            }
        }
    }
}

        ﻿async function updateStatusPanel(gameData) {
    if (!gameData || !gameData.stat_data) return;
    const stat = gameData.stat_data;
    
    // Phase 1: Update Unmapped (Global) Bindings
    updateBindingsIn(document.body, stat, stat);
    updateLorebookContent(document.body); // Async

    // Phase 2: Update Mapped Blocks (Collections/Records)
    const containers = document.querySelectorAll('[data-bind-root]');
    for (const container of containers) {
         const rootKey = container.getAttribute('data-bind-root');
         const templateId = container.getAttribute('data-template');
         if (rootKey && templateId) {
              const rootData = getV(stat, rootKey, null);
              // Pass global 'stat' as rootData
              renderBlock(container.id, rootData, templateId, stat);
              updateLorebookContent(container); // Async
         }
    }

    // Phase 3: Interactive Map
    updateMapPanel(stat);
}

// --- MVU Event Logic (Native) ---
let _lastStatData = null;
let _lastSaveTime = 0;

const parseMessageIdFromName = (name) => {
    if (!name || typeof name !== 'string' || !name.includes('message')) return -1;
    const match = name.match(/message.*?(\d+)/i);
    if (!match) return -1;
    const parsed = Number(match[1]);
    return Number.isFinite(parsed) && parsed >= 0 ? parsed : -1;
};

const resolveCurrentMessageId = () => {
    // 1. Prefer SillyTavern API over iframe name to avoid stale IDs.
    if (typeof getCurrentMessageId === "function") {
        const apiId = Number(getCurrentMessageId());
        if (Number.isFinite(apiId) && apiId >= 0) return apiId;
    }

    // 2. Iframe name
    const frameId = parseMessageIdFromName(window.name);
    if (frameId >= 0) return frameId;

    // 3. Parent Iframe name
    const parentFrameId = parseMessageIdFromName(window.parent && window.parent.name);
    if (parentFrameId >= 0) return parentFrameId;

    return -1;
};

const refreshFromMvu = async () => {
     // Polling Enabled (Parallel with Events)
    let latestStatData = null;
    const targetWindow = (typeof window.getVariables === "function" && window) || (window.parent && typeof window.parent.getVariables === "function" && window.parent) || null;

    if (targetWindow) {
        const msgId = resolveCurrentMessageId();
        if (msgId >= 0) {
            const context = { type: 'message', message_id: msgId };
            const vars = targetWindow.getVariables(context);
            if (vars && vars.stat_data) latestStatData = vars.stat_data;
        }
        if (!latestStatData) {
            const globalVars = targetWindow.getVariables();
            if (globalVars && globalVars.stat_data) latestStatData = globalVars.stat_data;
        }
    }
    
    // Fallback
    if (!latestStatData) {
         try {
            const msgId = resolveCurrentMessageId();
            if (msgId >= 0) {
                const messages = await getChatMessages(msgId);
                if (messages?.[0]?.data?.stat_data) latestStatData = messages[0].data.stat_data;
            }
         } catch(e) {}
    }

    if (latestStatData) {
        // Determine if we need to update
        // If we are editing (modal open), pause updates to prevent overwrite.
        // The modal is hosted in getModalContext()'s document (window.parent when reachable),
        // not necessarily this iframe's own document — check there.
        const modal = getModalContext().context.document.getElementById("portrait-mode-modal");
        if (modal && modal.style.display === "flex") return;
        
        // NEW: Cooldown check to prevent race condition
        if (Date.now() - _lastSaveTime < 2000) return;

        const isDifferent = JSON.stringify(latestStatData) !== JSON.stringify(_lastStatData);
        if (isDifferent) {
            await updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: latestStatData });
            _lastStatData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(latestStatData));
        }
    }
};

const initMvuConnection = async () => {
    // Find execution context
    let target = null;
    if (typeof window.waitGlobalInitialized === 'function') target = window;
    else if (window.parent && typeof window.parent.waitGlobalInitialized === 'function') target = window.parent;
    
    //console.log("[MZSMB] Context Search:", { found: !!target, isParent: target === window.parent });

    if (!target) {
         return;
    }
    
    // 1. Wait for Initialization
    try {
        await target.waitGlobalInitialized('Mvu');
    } catch (e) { }

    const Mvu = target.Mvu;
    let initialStat = null;

    // 2. Initial Fetch
    // 2. Initial Fetch (Prioritize Global Character Data for Upgrades)
    if (Mvu && Mvu.getMvuData) {
        // Try Global ('chat') first
        const chatData = Mvu.getMvuData({ type: 'chat' });
        if (chatData && chatData.stat_data) {
            initialStat = chatData.stat_data;
        } else {
            // Fallback to current message
            const msgId = resolveCurrentMessageId();
            if (msgId >= 0) {
                const msgData = Mvu.getMvuData({ type: 'message', message_id: msgId });
                if (msgData && msgData.stat_data) {
                    initialStat = msgData.stat_data;
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (initialStat) {
            await updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: initialStat });
            _lastStatData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(initialStat));
        }
    }

    // 3. Event Scubscription
    if (target.eventOn && Mvu && Mvu.events && Mvu.events.VARIABLE_UPDATE_ENDED) {
        target.eventOn(Mvu.events.VARIABLE_UPDATE_ENDED, async (data) => {
             // Check if we are editing (modal is hosted in getModalContext()'s document, not necessarily this one)
             const modal = getModalContext().context.document.getElementById("portrait-mode-modal");
             if (modal && modal.style.display === "flex") return;
             if (Date.now() - _lastSaveTime < 1000) return;

             // Use Lodash to extract data safely
             let stat = null;
             if (_ && _.get) {
                 stat = _.get(data, 'stat_data');
             } else {
                 stat = data?.stat_data;
             }

             // If data came in directly
             if (stat) {
                 await updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: stat });
                 _lastStatData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(stat));
             }
        });
    }

    // Polling Fallback (Runs in parallel to catch missed events)
    setInterval(refreshFromMvu, 2000);

    return initialStat;
};

// Strip internal runtime keys ($key, $raw, $meta) recursively before saving
function stripInternalKeys(obj) {
    if (!obj || typeof obj !== 'object' || Array.isArray(obj)) return obj;
    for (const k of Object.keys(obj)) {
        if (k === '$key' || k === '$raw' || k === '$meta') {
            delete obj[k];
        } else {
            stripInternalKeys(obj[k]);
        }
    }
    return obj;
}

// Save Function
async function saveStatData(updatedStat) {
    if (!updatedStat) return;
    stripInternalKeys(updatedStat);
    _lastSaveTime = Date.now(); // Mark save time
    const messageId = resolveCurrentMessageId();
    const context = (messageId >= 0) ? { type: 'message', message_id: messageId } : null;

    try {
        // 1. MVU Extension (Preferred)
        // Use updateVariablesWith to ensure we don't clobber other extensions
        if (typeof updateVariablesWith === 'function') {
            const saveContext = context || { type: 'chat' };
            await updateVariablesWith((vars) => {
                if (_ && _.set) {
                     _.set(vars, 'stat_data', updatedStat);
                } else {
                     vars.stat_data = updatedStat;
                }
                return vars;
            }, saveContext);
        }
        // 2. Standard Variables
        else if (typeof window.insertOrAssignVariables === 'function') {
            const payload = { stat_data: updatedStat };
            await window.insertOrAssignVariables(payload, { type: 'chat' });
            if (messageId >= 0) {
                await window.insertOrAssignVariables(payload, { type: 'message', message_id: messageId });
            }
        } else {
            console.warn("[MZSMB] No save method available");
            return; // Fail silent or alert
        }
        
        // Update local state immediately
        _lastStatData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(updatedStat));
        await updateStatusPanel({ stat_data: updatedStat });

    } catch (e) { console.error('[MZSMB] saveStatData failed:', e); alert("Failed to save data"); }
}

// --- Modal State & Logic ---
const __modalState = { currentPath: null };

function openPortraitModeModal(path) {
    __modalState.currentPath = path;
    const modal = getOrCreateEditModal();
    if (modal) {
         const input = modal.querySelector('input');
         if(input) {
             // Pre-populate with existing value (localStorage or MVU)
             let currentValue = '';
             try {
                 // Try localStorage first (for local uploaded images)
                 currentValue = localStorage.getItem('mzsb_img_' + path) || '';
             } catch (e) {}
             
             // Fallback to MVU if not in localStorage
             if (!currentValue && typeof getV === 'function' && _lastStatData) {
                 const mvuValue = getV(_lastStatData, path, '');
                 if (mvuValue && mvuValue !== 'N/A') {
                     currentValue = Array.isArray(mvuValue) ? mvuValue[0] : mvuValue;
                 }
             }
             
             // Only show URLs in the text input, not base64 data
             if (currentValue && currentValue.toLowerCase().startsWith('data:')) {
                 input.value = '';
                 input.placeholder = '(Local image currently set) Enter URL to replace...';
             } else {
                 input.value = currentValue;
                 input.placeholder = 'https://...';
             }
         }
         modal.style.display = 'flex';
         if(input) input.focus();
    }
}

function handleEditClick(evt, btn) {
     const key = btn.dataset.key;
     const saveRoot = btn.getAttribute('data-save-root');
     const saveLeaf = btn.getAttribute('data-save-leaf');
     let fullPath = saveLeaf || '';
     
     if (key && saveRoot) {
         fullPath = saveRoot + "." + key + "." + saveLeaf; 
     } else if (saveRoot) {
         fullPath = saveRoot + "." + saveLeaf;
     }
     
     openPortraitModeModal(fullPath);
}

function closePortraitModeModal() {
    const { context } = getModalContext();
    const modal = context.document.getElementById('portrait-mode-modal');
    if (modal) modal.style.display = 'none';
    __modalState.currentPath = null;
}

function applyPortraitUpdate(rawInput) {
     const path = __modalState.currentPath;
     if (!path) return;
     
     const url = rawInput ? String(rawInput).trim() : '';
     
     // Basic validation – accept http/https URLs and data: URIs (from local file)
     if (url && !(url.toLowerCase().startsWith('http://') || url.toLowerCase().startsWith('https://') || url.toLowerCase().startsWith('data:'))) {
         alert("Invalid URL format. Must start with http:// or https://");
         return;
     }
     
     // If valid, apply update
     if (url) {
         // --- Storage Strategy ---
         // Local file (base64): Save to localStorage to avoid bloating MVU with large strings
         // URL: Save to MVU (small string, syncs across sessions/devices)
         if (url.toLowerCase().startsWith('data:')) {
             try {
                 localStorage.setItem('mzsb_img_' + path, url);
                 console.log('[MZSMB] Saved local image to localStorage:', path);
             } catch (e) {
                 console.warn('[MZSMB] localStorage save failed:', e);
                 alert('Failed to save image. Storage may be full.');
                 return;
             }
             // Clear MVU value so localStorage takes priority
             applyValueUpdate(path, '');
         } else {
             // URL: Save to MVU (small string)
             // First clear localStorage so MVU takes priority
             try { localStorage.removeItem('mzsb_img_' + path); } catch (e) {}
             applyValueUpdate(path, url);
         }
         closePortraitModeModal();
     }
}

// --- Local Image Compression ---
function compressLocalImage(file, opts) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        if (!file) return reject(new Error('no_file'));
        const maxSide = (opts && opts.maxSide) || 512;
        const maxBytes = (opts && opts.maxBytes) || 240 * 1024;
        const minQuality = (opts && opts.minQuality) || 0.5;
        let quality = (opts && opts.quality) || 0.85;

        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('read_failed'));
        reader.onload = () => {
            const img = new Image();
            img.onerror = () => reject(new Error('decode_failed'));
            img.onload = () => {
                const longest = Math.max(img.width, img.height) || 1;
                const scale = Math.min(1, maxSide / longest);
                const targetW = Math.max(1, Math.round(img.width * scale));
                const targetH = Math.max(1, Math.round(img.height * scale));
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = targetW;
                canvas.height = targetH;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                if (!ctx) return reject(new Error('canvas_failed'));
                ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, targetW, targetH);

                const getSize = (s) => Math.ceil((s.split(',')[1] || '').length * 3 / 4);
                let out = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality);
                while (getSize(out) > maxBytes && quality > minQuality) {
                    quality = Math.max(minQuality, quality - 0.1);
                    out = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality);
                }
                resolve(out);
            };
            img.src = String(reader.result || '');
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
}

// --- Image Popup ---
function showImagePopup(url) {
    if (!url || url === 'N/A') return;
    
    // Try to access parent context (SillyTavern)
    let context = window;
    let targetBody = document.body;
    try {
        if (window.parent && window.parent !== window && window.parent.document) {
            context = window.parent;
            targetBody = window.parent.document.body;
        }
    } catch (e) { console.info("[MZSMB] Cross-origin parent access blocked"); }

    let overlay = context.document.getElementById('img-popup-overlay');
    if (!overlay) {
        overlay = context.document.createElement('div');
        overlay.id = 'img-popup-overlay';
        overlay.className = 'img-popup-overlay';
        
        // Inline Critical Styles because Parent might not have CSS
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed; inset:0; width:100vw; height:100dvh; min-height:100dvh; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85); z-index:55000; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:auto; cursor:zoom-out; padding:12px; box-sizing:border-box;';
        
        overlay.onclick = (e) => {
             if (e.target === overlay) {
                 overlay.style.display = 'none';
                 if (context !== window) overlay.remove(); // Clean up if in parent
             }
        };

        const closeBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
        closeBtn.id = 'img-popup-close-btn';
        closeBtn.type = 'button';
        closeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Close image preview');
        closeBtn.innerHTML = '×';
        closeBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed; top:12px; right:12px; width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background:rgba(0,0,0,0.65); color:#fff; font-size:28px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; z-index:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;';
        closeBtn.onclick = (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            overlay.style.display = 'none';
            if (context !== window) overlay.remove();
        };
        
        const img = context.document.createElement('img');
        img.className = 'img-popup-content';
        img.style.cssText = 'max-width:calc(100vw - 24px); max-height:calc(100vh - 24px); width:auto; height:auto; display:block; border-radius:4px; box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); object-fit:contain;';
        overlay.appendChild(closeBtn);
        overlay.appendChild(img);
        targetBody.appendChild(overlay);
    }
    
    // Keep popup layers exclusive to avoid stacked overlays on mobile
    const portraitModal = context.document.getElementById('portrait-mode-modal');
    if (portraitModal) portraitModal.style.display = 'none';

    const img = overlay.querySelector('img');
    const viewportW = (context.visualViewport && context.visualViewport.width) || context.innerWidth || window.innerWidth || 320;
    const viewportH = (context.visualViewport && context.visualViewport.height) || context.innerHeight || window.innerHeight || 320;
    const maxW = Math.max(120, Math.floor(viewportW - 24));
    const maxH = Math.max(120, Math.floor(viewportH - 24));
    img.style.maxWidth = maxW + 'px';
    img.style.maxHeight = maxH + 'px';
    img.src = url;
    overlay.style.display = 'flex';
}

async function applyValueUpdate(path, val) {
    if (!path || !_lastStatData) return;
    const stat = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_lastStatData));
    
    const parts = path.split('.');
    let cur = stat;
    for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
        if (!cur[parts[i]]) cur[parts[i]] = {};
        cur = cur[parts[i]];
    }
    const lastKey = parts[parts.length - 1];
    
    const existing = cur[lastKey];
    let newVal = val;
    
    // Preserve Tuple Label if exists
    if (Array.isArray(existing) && existing.length === 2 && typeof existing[1] === 'string') {
        newVal = [val, existing[1]];
    }
    
    cur[lastKey] = newVal;
    await saveStatData(stat);
}

// Initialize Modal (Lazy or On Load)
// We defer modal creation to ensure we attach to the right context

function getModalContext() {
     let context = window;
     let targetBody = document.body;
     try {
        if (window.parent && window.parent !== window && window.parent.document) {
            context = window.parent;
            targetBody = window.parent.document.body;
        }
     } catch (e) { }
     return { context, targetBody };
}

     }

     // We must re-bind them to the CURRENT window context.
     
     // Refresh styles every call because parent-stored modal can outlive iframe reloads
     modal.style.cssText = 'display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; width:100vw; height:100dvh; min-height:100dvh; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85); z-index:60000; justify-content:center; align-items:center; overflow:auto; padding:12px; box-sizing:border-box; backdrop-filter: blur(2px);';

     const content = modal.querySelector('#portrait-mode-content');

         content.style.cssText = 'background:#001f3f; border:1px solid #00e5ff; padding:20px; border-radius:8px; width:90%; max-width:min(400px, calc(100vw - 24px)); max-height:calc(100vh - 24px); overflow:auto; color:#e0f7fa; position:relative; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); box-sizing:border-box;';
     }

     const bodyRow = modal.querySelector('#portrait-mode-body-row');
     if (bodyRow) {
         bodyRow.style.marginTop = '20px';
         bodyRow.style.display = 'flex';
         bodyRow.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
         bodyRow.style.gap = '8px';
     }

     const saveBtn = modal.querySelector('#portrait-mode-save-btn') || modal.querySelector('button:last-child') || modal.querySelectorAll('button')[1]; // fallback for legacy structure
     const urlInput = modal.querySelector('input');
     const closeBtn = modal.querySelector('#portrait-mode-close-btn');

     if (saveBtn && urlInput) {
         urlInput.style.cssText = 'flex:1 1 220px; min-width:0; width:100%; padding:10px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.3); color:#e0f7fa; border-radius:4px; outline:none; transition: border 0.2s; font-family: sans-serif;';
         saveBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:10px 20px; background:rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.2); border:1px solid #00e5ff; color:#00e5ff; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:bold; transition: background 0.2s; font-family: sans-serif; white-space:nowrap;';

         // Clear old listeners by overwriting
         saveBtn.onclick = (e) => {
              e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();
              const url = urlInput.value.trim();
              if (url) {
                  if (window.applyPortraitUpdate) window.applyPortraitUpdate(url);
                  urlInput.value = ''; 
              }
         };
         // Re-bind Enter key too
         urlInput.onkeydown = (e) => {
              if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                  e.preventDefault();
                  saveBtn.click();
              }
         };
     }
     
     // Re-bind browse button handler on every modal retrieval
     const browseBtn = modal.querySelector('#portrait-mode-browse-btn');
     if (browseBtn) {
         browseBtn.style.cssText = 'width:100%; padding:10px 20px; background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1); border:1px dashed rgba(0,229,255,0.4); color:#81d4fa; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:bold; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; font-family: sans-serif;';
         browseBtn.onclick = (e) => {
             e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();
             const { context: ctx } = getModalContext();
             const fileInput = ctx.document.createElement('input');
             fileInput.type = 'file';
             fileInput.accept = 'image/*';
             fileInput.onchange = async (ev) => {
                 const file = ev.target.files && ev.target.files[0];
                 if (!file) return;
                 try {
                     browseBtn.textContent = 'Processing...';
                     browseBtn.disabled = true;
                     const base64 = await compressLocalImage(file, { maxSide: 1920, maxBytes: 1536 * 1024, quality: 0.9, minQuality: 0.6 });
                     if (window.applyPortraitUpdate) window.applyPortraitUpdate(base64);
                 } catch (err) {
                     console.warn('[MZSMB] Local image processing failed:', err);
                     alert('Failed to process image: ' + (err.message || err));
                 } finally {
                     browseBtn.textContent = '\uD83D\uDCC2 Browse Local File';
                     browseBtn.disabled = false;
                 }
             };
             fileInput.click();
         };
     }

     if (closeBtn) {
         closeBtn.onclick = (e) => { 
             e.preventDefault(); 
             modal.style.display = 'none'; 
         };
     }
     
     // Ensure modal close on background click is also fresh
     modal.onclick = (e) => { 
         if(e.target === modal) modal.style.display = 'none'; 
     };

     return modal;
}

        ﻿// --- Equip/Unequip GUI Logic (Phase 3) ---
const EQUIP_STAT_MAP = {
    StrBonus:       'Strength',
    AgiBonus:       'Agility',
    IntBonus:       'Intelligence',
    ConBonus:       'Constitution',
    WisBonus:       'Wisdom',
    ChaBonus:       'Charisma',
};

const SLOT_LIMITS = {
    Hand:   { limit: 2, group: 'weapon' },
    Body:   { limit: 1, group: 'armor' },
    Finger: { limit: 2, group: 'accessory' },
    Wrist:  { limit: 2, group: 'accessory' },
    Ankle:  { limit: 2, group: 'accessory' },
    Neck:   { limit: 1, group: 'accessory' },
    Misc:   { limit: 10, group: 'misc' },
};
const ACCESSORY_SLOTS = ['Finger', 'Wrist', 'Ankle', 'Neck'];

function applyEquipStats(charObj, equipData, direction) {
    if (!charObj || !equipData || typeof equipData !== 'object') return;
    
    const applyBonus = (obj, key, bonusAmount) => {
        if (obj[key] === undefined) obj[key] = 0;
        if (Array.isArray(obj[key]) && obj[key].length > 0) {
            obj[key][0] = Number(obj[key][0] || 0) + bonusAmount;
        } else {
            obj[key] = Number(obj[key] || 0) + bonusAmount;
        }
    };
    
    for (const [eqKey, charKey] of Object.entries(EQUIP_STAT_MAP)) {
        if (equipData[eqKey] !== undefined) {
            const bonus = Number(equipData[eqKey]) || 0;
            if (bonus !== 0) applyBonus(charObj, charKey, direction * bonus);
        }
    }
}

function getEquippedInSlot(charEquipObj, slot) {
    if (!charEquipObj) return [];
    const equipped = [];
    for (const [key, item] of Object.entries(charEquipObj)) {
        if (item && typeof item === 'object' && item.Slot === slot) {
            equipped.push({ key, item });
        }
    }
    return equipped;
}

function getAccessoryCount(charEquipObj) {
    if (!charEquipObj) return 0;
    let count = 0;
    for (const [key, item] of Object.entries(charEquipObj)) {
        if (item && typeof item === 'object' && ACCESSORY_SLOTS.includes(item.Slot)) {
            count++;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

// Discover all list-container full paths in the DOM for a given layout type
// (e.g. "inventory" or "equipment-action"). Optionally restrict to those that
// sit under a given character root path (e.g. "Mainchar" or "Partner.Hana").
// Returns alphabetically-sorted full paths.
function findListPathsByType(listType, charRootPath) {
    const out = [];
    try {
        const nodes = document.querySelectorAll('[data-list-type="' + listType + '"]');
        nodes.forEach(n => {
            const full = n.getAttribute('data-bind-list-fullpath') || n.getAttribute('data-bind-list') || '';
            if (!full) return;
            if (charRootPath && !(full === charRootPath || full.startsWith(charRootPath + '.'))) return;
            out.push(full);
        });
    } catch (e) { /* DOM may be unavailable */ }
    // Unique + alphabetical
    return Array.from(new Set(out)).sort();
}

// Resolve (and lazily create) a nested object at the given dot path on `root`.
function resolvePathObject(root, fullPath, createMissing) {
    if (!fullPath) return null;
    const parts = fullPath.split('.').filter(p => p);
    let cur = root;
    for (let i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
        if (cur && typeof cur === 'object' && cur[parts[i]] !== undefined) {
            cur = cur[parts[i]];
        } else if (createMissing) {
            cur[parts[i]] = {};
            cur = cur[parts[i]];
        } else {
            return null;
        }
    }
    return cur;
}

// Pick the canonical inventory path (alphabetically first list with layout=inventory).
// Fallback to "Mainchar.Inventory" when no such layout is present in the DOM.
function getCanonicalInventoryPath() {
    const paths = findListPathsByType('inventory');
    return paths.length > 0 ? paths[0] : 'Mainchar.Inventory';
}

// Pick the canonical equipment container path for a given character root.
// Alphabetically first list with layout=equipment-action under the char root.
// Fallback to "<charRootPath>.Equipment".
function getCanonicalEquipmentPath(charRootPath) {
    const paths = findListPathsByType('equipment-action', charRootPath);
    return paths.length > 0 ? paths[0] : (charRootPath ? charRootPath + '.Equipment' : '');
}

window.equipItem = async function(itemKey, itemData, inventoryPath, targetCharPath) {
    try {
        if (!_lastStatData) return;
        const stat = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_lastStatData));

        // Get Source Inventory
        const invTarget = resolvePathObject(stat, inventoryPath, false);
        if (!invTarget) {
            alert('Source inventory not found: ' + inventoryPath);
            return;
        }

        // Get Target Character (create path if missing)
        const charTarget = resolvePathObject(stat, targetCharPath, true);
        if (!charTarget) {
            alert('Target character not found: ' + targetCharPath);
            return;
        }

        // Resolve the equipment container (layout-driven; fallback to .Equipment).
        // Path is relative to the target character.
        const equipFullPath = getCanonicalEquipmentPath(targetCharPath);
        const equipLeaf = equipFullPath.slice(targetCharPath.length + 1) || 'Equipment';
        if (!charTarget[equipLeaf] || typeof charTarget[equipLeaf] !== 'object') {
            charTarget[equipLeaf] = {};
        }
        const equipContainer = charTarget[equipLeaf];

        // Check Slot Limits
        const slot = itemData.Slot || itemData.slot; // Support both for safety during transition
        if (!slot) {
            alert('Item cannot be equipped: missing Slot definition.');
            return;
        }

        // Keep track of items we auto-unequip
        const itemsToUnequip = [];

        if (ACCESSORY_SLOTS.includes(slot)) {
            const currentAccessories = getAccessoryCount(equipContainer);
            if (currentAccessories >= 3) {
                alert('Cannot equip accessory: Max limit of 3 accessories reached. Please unequip one first.');
                return;
            }
        } else if (SLOT_LIMITS[slot]) {
            // Weapon or Armor
            const currentlyEquipped = getEquippedInSlot(equipContainer, slot);
            const slotLimit = SLOT_LIMITS[slot].limit;
            if (currentlyEquipped.length >= slotLimit) {
                // Auto-unequip the oldest items in this slot to make room for the new one!
                const numToUnequip = (currentlyEquipped.length - slotLimit) + 1;
                itemsToUnequip.push(...currentlyEquipped.slice(0, numToUnequip));
            }
        } else {
            alert('Item cannot be equipped: invalid slot ' + slot);
            return;
        }

        // Perform Auto-Unequips
        for (const oldItem of itemsToUnequip) {
            reverseEquipAndReturnToInventory(stat, charTarget, equipContainer, oldItem.key, oldItem.item, invTarget);
        }

        // Complete state update
        applyEquipStats(charTarget, itemData, 1);

        // Re-render UI
        // Move from Inventory to Equipment
        // Important: Clone itemData so we don't modify the inventory reference before deep copy completes
        const finalEquipData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(itemData));
        // Remove Qty from equipment slot (it's 1 item)
        delete finalEquipData.Qty;
        delete finalEquipData.$key;
        delete finalEquipData.$raw;

        // Add to equipment container
        // Handle duplicate names
        let finalItemKey = itemKey;
        let counter = 2;
        while (equipContainer[finalItemKey] !== undefined) {
            finalItemKey = itemKey + " " + counter;
            counter++;
        }
        equipContainer[finalItemKey] = finalEquipData;

        // Decrement or Remove from Inventory
        if (invTarget[itemKey] && invTarget[itemKey].Qty) {
            const currentQty = Number(invTarget[itemKey].Qty);
            if (currentQty > 1) {
                invTarget[itemKey].Qty = currentQty - 1;
            } else {
                delete invTarget[itemKey];
            }
        } else {
            delete invTarget[itemKey];
        }

        // Final recalculation after all state/equipment changes are committed
        recalculateDerivedStats(charTarget);

        // Save and Re-render
        await saveStatData(stat);
        if (window.closeEquipModal) window.closeEquipModal();

    } catch (e) {
        console.error('[MZSMB] Equip failed:', e);
        alert('Failed to equip item.');
    }
};

function reverseEquipAndReturnToInventory(statObj, charTarget, equipContainer, equipKey, equipData, invTarget) {
    // Apply reverse stats
    applyEquipStats(charTarget, equipData, -1);

    // Remove from the actual equipment container (e.g. Mainchar.Equipment, Mainchar.Belongings, etc.)
    if (equipContainer && typeof equipContainer === 'object') {
        delete equipContainer[equipKey];
    }

    // Final recalculation after removal
    recalculateDerivedStats(charTarget);

    // Reconstruct inventory item
    const invItem = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(equipData));
    invItem.Qty = 1;

    // Try to stack if identical item exists, otherwise add new
    if (invTarget[equipKey]) {
        // If it already exists, just bump Qty (this assumes stats match)
        invTarget[equipKey].Qty = (Number(invTarget[equipKey].Qty) || 0) + 1;
    } else {
        invTarget[equipKey] = invItem;
    }
}

window.unequipItem = async function(equipKey, equipData, charEquipPath, charPath) {
    try {
        if (!_lastStatData) return;
        const stat = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_lastStatData));

        // Get Char Target
        const charTarget = resolvePathObject(stat, charPath, false);
        if (!charTarget) {
            throw new Error("Character target '" + charPath + "' not found.");
        }

        // Get the actual equipment container (may be named Equipment, Belongings, etc.)
        const equipContainer = resolvePathObject(stat, charEquipPath, false);

        // Resolve the inventory destination dynamically from layout (fallback: Mainchar.Inventory).
        const inventoryPath = getCanonicalInventoryPath();
        const invTarget = resolvePathObject(stat, inventoryPath, true);

        reverseEquipAndReturnToInventory(stat, charTarget, equipContainer, equipKey, equipData, invTarget);

        // Save and Re-render
        await saveStatData(stat);
    } catch (e) {
        console.error('[MZSMB] Unequip failed:', e);
        alert('Failed to unequip item.');
    }
};

window.showUnequipConfirm = function(equipKey, equipData, charEquipPath, charPath) {
    if (confirm("Unequip " + equipKey + "?")) {
        window.unequipItem(equipKey, equipData, charEquipPath, charPath);
    }
};

window.showEquipModal = function(itemKey, itemData, inventoryPath) {
    if (!_lastStatData) return;

    // Build Character List
    const chars = [];
    if (_lastStatData.Mainchar) {
        chars.push({ name: 'Main Character', path: 'Mainchar' });
    }
    for (const rootKey of Object.keys(_lastStatData)) {
        if (rootKey === 'Mainchar') continue;
        if (COLLECTION_PATHS.has('.' + rootKey) && typeof _lastStatData[rootKey] === 'object') {
            for (const memberKey in _lastStatData[rootKey]) {
                chars.push({ name: memberKey + ' (' + rootKey + ')', path: rootKey + '.' + memberKey });
            }
        }
    }

    if (chars.length === 0) {
        alert('No characters found to equip item.');
        return;
    }

    // Try to access parent context (SillyTavern) for better positioning
    let context = window;
    let targetBody = document.body;
    try {
        if (window.parent && window.parent !== window && window.parent.document) {
            context = window.parent;
            targetBody = window.parent.document.body;
        }
    } catch (e) {}

    let overlay = context.document.getElementById('equip-modal-overlay');
    if (!overlay) {
        overlay = context.document.createElement('div');
        overlay.id = 'equip-modal-overlay';
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed; inset:0; width:100vw; height:100dvh; min-height:100dvh; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85); z-index:50000; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; overflow:auto; padding:12px; box-sizing:border-box; backdrop-filter:blur(2px);';

        const content = context.document.createElement('div');
        content.style.cssText = 'background:#001f3f; border:1px solid #00e5ff; padding:20px; border-radius:8px; width:90%; max-width:min(400px, calc(100vw - 24px)); max-height:calc(100vh - 24px); overflow:auto; color:#e0f7fa; box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,229,255,0.2); box-sizing:border-box;';

        const header = context.document.createElement('h3');
        header.id = 'equip-modal-title';
        header.style.cssText = 'margin-top:0; color:#00e5ff; margin-bottom:15px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); padding-bottom:10px;';

        const charList = context.document.createElement('div');
        charList.id = 'equip-modal-char-list';
        charList.style.cssText = 'display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; max-height:300px; overflow-y:auto; margin-bottom:15px;';

        const closeBtn = context.document.createElement('button');
        closeBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
        closeBtn.style.cssText = 'width:100%; padding:10px; background:rgba(255,100,100,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(255,100,100,0.4); color:#ff6b6b; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:bold; transition:all 0.2s;';
        closeBtn.onmouseover = () => closeBtn.style.background = 'rgba(255,100,100,0.2)';
        closeBtn.onmouseout = () => closeBtn.style.background = 'rgba(255,100,100,0.1)';

        window.closeEquipModal = () => {
            overlay.style.display = 'none';
            if (context !== window) overlay.remove();
        };

        closeBtn.onclick = window.closeEquipModal;
        overlay.onclick = (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) window.closeEquipModal(); };

        content.appendChild(header);
        content.appendChild(charList);
        content.appendChild(closeBtn);
        overlay.appendChild(content);
        targetBody.appendChild(overlay);
    }

    const elTitle = context.document.getElementById('equip-modal-title');
    const elList = context.document.getElementById('equip-modal-char-list');

    if (elTitle) elTitle.textContent = 'Equip to...';
    if (elList) {
        elList.innerHTML = '';
        chars.forEach(char => {
            const btn = context.document.createElement('button');
            btn.textContent = char.name;
            btn.style.cssText = 'padding:12px; background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3); color:#e0f7fa; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; text-align:left; font-size:1em; transition:all 0.2s;';
            btn.onmouseover = () => { btn.style.background = 'rgba(0,229,255,0.3)'; btn.style.borderColor = '#00e5ff'; };
            btn.onmouseout = () => { btn.style.background = 'rgba(0,229,255,0.1)'; btn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(0,229,255,0.3)'; };

            btn.onclick = () => {
                window.equipItem(itemKey, itemData, inventoryPath, char.path);
            };
            elList.appendChild(btn);
        });
    }

    overlay.style.display = 'flex';
};
    </script>
</body>
</html>

entries.content:
<progression_system>
#v2.2

Level & EXP:
  - Start Lv 1, hard cap Lv 140.
  - Level up at 1000 EXP (fixed). Subtract 1000, carry over excess.
  - On level up: +5 core-points (allocate to STR/AGI/CON/INT/WIS), fully restore HP/MP/SP.

EXP Sources:
  Combat (base EXP at same level):
    - Common: 150 | Elite: 300 | Boss: 500-2000
    - Level modifier: Enemy higher → +10% per level diff | Enemy lower → -10% per level diff
    - Formula: Final_EXP = Base_EXP × (1 + Level_Diff × 0.1)
    - Example: Lv 72 Elite vs Lv 67 Party → 300 × 1.5 = 450 EXP
    - ALL familiars gain full EXP (no split), regardless of battle team or presence.
  Milestone:
    - Major world-changing story decision: 1000 EXP.

Quest Rewards:
  - Quests do NOT give direct EXP. Rewards: Currency, Potions, Equipment (per <equipment_guide>), Key Items.

LEVEL 70 GATE (HARD RULE - applies to Mainchar AND ALL Familiars):
  - Level MUST NOT increase beyond 70 unless "/Mainchar/Inventory/Level Limit Break Seal" exists.
  - If seal missing: cancel level-up, keep Level 70, EXP still accumulates.
  - If seal present: level-up proceeds normally.

  Trigger at Lv 69:
    - When Mainchar reaches exactly Lv 69 AND quest "Level Limit Break" does not exist:
      - Create quest:
        {"op":"add","path":"/Mainchar/Quests/Level Limit Break","value":{"Desc":"Go to Nameless Isle. Progress (1/10).","Reward":"Level Limit Break Seal","Difficulty":"A","Status":"active"}}
      - Print RED message once: "Level 71 can't be achieved until Level Limit Break Seal is obtained"

  Seal Acquisition:
    - When story grants the seal:
      - Add: {"op":"add","path":"/Mainchar/Inventory/Level Limit Break Seal","value":{"Qty":1,"Type":"Key Item","Desc":"A seal that shatters the mortal limit. Required to surpass Lv 70."}}
      - Remove quest "Level Limit Break" (completed).

  Level Limit Break Quest Narrative Rules:
    - AI introduces Nameless Isle organically (rumors, NPC dialogue about danger/taboo).
    - NPC must state: Lv 70 is mortal limit, Seal is at bottom of Nameless Isle dungeon.
    - Quest MUST be difficult: multiple dungeon layers, escalating danger, resource attrition, traps, anti-magic zones, elite patrols, final boss guarding Seal.
    - Meaningful setbacks (wounds, lost supplies, moral choices). Fair and winnable at Lv 69+, impossible below.
    - Path: Travel to Nameless Isle (only from Port of Joy, see <Holy_Radiance_Theocracy>) -> enter dungeon -> reach deepest floor -> obtain Seal -> exit.

  Level-Up Enforcement (AI runtime):
    - Every level-up while Level >= 70: check "/Mainchar/Inventory/Level Limit Break Seal" before allowing.
</progression_system>

<character_attributes_system>
## ver 2.1
  1. Base Attributes:
    Definition: "The core capabilities of a character, developed by allocating attribute points obtained through leveling up. These form the basis for DC (Difficulty Class) checks and provide bonuses to derived attributes."
    List:
      Strength (Str):
        Description: "Measures a character's physical power, athletic ability, and sturdiness."
      Agility (Agi):
        Description: "Measures a character's physical flexibility, reaction speed, balance, and fine motor skills. Determines initiative and evasion chances."
      Constitution (Con):
        Description: "Measures a character's health, stamina, and vitality."
      Intelligence (Int):
        Description: "Measures a character's logical reasoning, memory, analytical ability, and breadth of knowledge. It is the source of traditional offensive magic, astral magic, and magitech."
      Wisdom (Wis):
        Description: "Measures a character's intuition, insight, and ability to perceive and attune to the surrounding environment and natural laws. It is the foundation for healing/support magic and Xian arts."
      Charisma (Cha):
        Description: "The only attribute that cannot be increased via leveling up. Value ranges from 1-100. Determined by the character's description upon introduction. Measures beauty, persuasion, social skills, leadership, as well as inner willpower and spiritual presence. It is the foundation for divine magic and Kotodama (Word Soul) powers. 80+ is considered a stunning beauty. 90+ implies god-tier social skills, leadership, strategic ability, or nation-toppling beauty."

  Derived Attributes:
    Health Points (HP):
      Formula: "20 + (Constitution * 3) + (Level * 6) + sum(MaxHPBonus)"
      Description: "If reduced to zero, it triggers the [Phoenix Pact], returning the character to their pre-battle state. Fully restored after sleeping. Note: Scales linearly to ensure smooth progression without mid-game dips."

    Stamina (SP):
      Formula: "(50 + (Constitution * 3) + (Agility * 2) + (Level * 5))/3"
      Description: "Used for weapon skill as well as during sex."

    Mana (MP):
      Formula: "(50 + (Intelligence * 4) + (Wisdom * 2) + (Level * 5))/3 + sum(MaxMPBonus)"
      Description: "Resource for casting spells. Intelligence provides primary growth. Fully restored after sleeping."
      
    Physical Damage (P.Atk):
      Formula: "(Strength * 2) + (Level * 2) + sum(WeaponDamage)"
      Description: "Physical damage used in Battle."
      
    Magic Damage (M.Atk):
      Formula: "(Intelligence * 2) + (Level * 2) + sum(WeaponMagDamage)"
      Description: "Magic damage used in Battle."
      
     Physical Defense (Physical_defense):
      Formula: "(Constitution / 2) + (Level * 3) + sum(ArmorPDefBonus)"
      Definition: "Base P.Def from stats, plus armor bonuses. When reading from <CURRENT_VARIABLE_DATA> during combat, use the value directly (GUI keeps it up to date). When AI must recalculate (see EQUIPMENT SYSTEM RULES in <COT_Guide>), apply the full formula."

    Magic Defense (Magic_defense):
      Formula: "(Wisdom / 2) + (Level * 3) + sum(ArmorMDefBonus)"
      Definition: "Base M.Def from stats, plus armor bonuses. When reading from <CURRENT_VARIABLE_DATA> during combat, use the value directly (GUI keeps it up to date). When AI must recalculate (see EQUIPMENT SYSTEM RULES in <COT_Guide>), apply the full formula."

    Magic Assist (Magic_assist):
      Formula: "(Wisdom * 1.5) + (Intelligence * 0.5) + (Level * 1.5)"
      Description: "Primarily used for Healing and Support magic. Used by <Healing_System> to scale healing output."

    Equipment Stat Bonuses:
      Note: "Equipment may provide bonuses such as WeaponDamage, WeaponMagDamage, ArmorPDefBonus, ArmorMDefBonus, MaxHPBonus, MaxMPBonus, StrBonus, AgiBonus, etc. The GUI  applies these automatically except the two cases where AI must recalculate, see EQUIPMENT SYSTEM RULES in <COT_Guide>."
</character_attributes_system>

<Schema_Syntax>
#v1.3
# If you make changes here, you need to make changes in Extension > Tavern Helper > Scripts > Scheme

# ⚠️ TUPLE FORMAT RULES:
# Fields marked #tuple<type,string> MUST be arrays: [value, "Label"]
# - #tuple<string,string> → ["value", "Label"]  e.g. ["Engni", "Name"]
# - #tuple<number,string> → [123, "Label"]      e.g. [66, "Level"]
# - #tuple<boolean,string> → [true, "Label"]    e.g. [true, "Is Present"]
# When using JSONPatch "add" operation, ALL tuple fields MUST use array format, not plain values.
# ❌ WRONG: "Affection": 60
# ✅ RIGHT: "Affection": [60, "Affection"]

World_Calc                           #object
World_Calc.(Factions,Locations,Ruins,Events)                    #record<string,any>
World_Calc.*                         #any (passthrough)

World                                #object
World.(Date,Time,Location,Weather)   #tuple<string,string>

Mainchar                             #object

Mainchar.(Level,Exp,Core-points,Strength,Agility,Constitution,
Intelligence,Wisdom,Charisma,Hp_curr,Hp_max,Mp_curr,Mp_max,
Sta_curr,Sta_max,Physical_attack,Physical_defense,Magic_attack,
Magic_defense,Magic_assist)          #tuple<number,string>
